 marla.pilpel 0 marla.pilpel Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 03/Nov/25 3:46 PM   3 image-20251030-155734.png 30/Oct/25 11:38 AM SCP Sprint 11 30/Oct/25 11:59 AM The reported issue regarding the missing "HPF" option during contract creation for the "Leased" employee type was due to a *misunderstanding of the system's filtering logic and data dependencies*, not a functional defect.

The system is correctly designed to *filter available HPF options* based on both the *active status* and the *employee/contract type* being created.

The test case failed because the clinician used only possessed an active HPF of type *"Locum,"* while the user attempted to create a contract of type *"Leased."* The system correctly filtered out the irrelevant "Locum" HPF, resulting in the option being hidden.

*Resolution:* The functionality was validated to work as expected when the contract type matched the HPF type ("Locum" contract successfully displayed the "Locum" HPF). The issue was closed after confirming the system is functioning according to its intended filtering design.
Requirements: Misunderstood Requirements
1|i0ggp3: 01/Jan/26 7:40 PM Tester: Nikhil Kotate

Persona: Data Quality

Test Case ID: CONT-002

Description: Test Case: CONT-002 - Create net-new Contract
To verify that a user can successfully create and submit a new contract request

1. Navigate to the Person Account (Search the global search for your Clinician and ensure you choose the search result with Account)
2. Click on the down arrow in the Quick Action area of the page and choose "Contract Request"
3. Choose Employee Type of "Leased" (Time Type will default to "Not Applicable")
4. Click "Next"
5. Enter a Contract Start Date
6. Click on "Start New Request" and click "Next"
7. Select one of more Facilities and click "Next"
8. Skip the Contract Confirmation by clicking "Next"
9. From the Contract Detail screen, click on the "Summary" tab
10. Click "Submit Contract Request"



Expected Result
When initiating a new contract request, the "HPF" option should be visible and selectable in the relevant field (e.g., funding type, contract type).


Actual Result
The "HPF" option was not available in the user interface. The user was unable to select it and therefore could not create the HPF contract.

UAT Bug: C&CUAT68 E2E | UAT | "HPF" option was not available in the user interface for Employee Type of "Leased". The user was unable to select it and therefore could not create the HPF contract

1|i0gfon: 29/Jan/26 9:04 PM *Steps to reproduce:*

# Login to Core HC org as System Admin
# Open a PO contract in Executed status and referenced in clinician contracts
# Clone this contract using ‘Request Contract Change’ button on linked Service account
# Now, update the values of Stipend and Target rates for 1 facility title alone
# Add a new Leadership Incentives rate
# Mark the status of cloned PO contract as Executed
# Verify the POC and CCM records created

*Expected Result:*

POC and CCM records should be created for contract’s facility title only for the conditions changed

*Actual Result:*

# POC records are created even if no conditions are satisfied *- retested and passed (aggregate query Shift Type check changed)*
# POC records are created for ‘Shift Mixed Bag Shift Rates’ even when condition is not satisfied *- retested and passed (Rule 5)*
# POC and CCM record not created for Rate Pay code change *- retested and passed (rule 11)*
# Shift rate increased/decreased rule getting added when Shift Bonus rate is increased/decreased *- retested and passed (Rule 8, 9 updated, condition added* Shift__r.Shift_Name__r.Code != “Shift Bonus”*)*
# No POC record created for NPPA Tier Change Query - Need to confirm the logic as {{PreventiveCareAgreement.Shift_r.CodeSetSubType = "Employee"}} will never be true since there is no Shift record with as {{CodeSetSubType}} Employee *- Solution Change to PreventiveCareAgreement.Facility_Title_r.CodeSetSubType = “Employee”*
# CCM records not getting created when only Agent and Automation POCs are created

Issues with POC and CCM record creation

None

When Refresh Client contract button is clicked, Due mismatch in type it is deleting the records at clinician level.

1|i0gd73: 17/Nov/25 8:23 PM Tester: Anne Lewis

Persona: Clinician Experience Specialist

Test Case ID: AF-001

Description: Expected to see the clinicians schedule. *Asked scripted question 'schedule for the month' and did not get the schedule, however, did get: Here is the detailed information regarding the monthly schedule for clinicians.*

Test script instructions - i have a question about a clinician
Could you please provide the clinician's name or their Global Provider ID so I can assist you further?

My Avatar
585564
The clinician has been successfully validated:

Name: Yolanda Brown
Title: NP
Global Provider ID: 585564
How can I assist you further?

My Avatar
schedule for the month
Here is the detailed information regarding the monthly schedule for clinicians:

Key Points About Monthly Schedules:
Submission of Availability:

Notify your Scheduler of unavailable dates at least 90 days before the scheduled month.
Example: Availability for April is due by January 1.
Availability Preferences:

Provide no more than six (6) dates off per month, including a maximum of one (1) weekend.
Open availability is preferred when possible.
Vacation and Extended Leave:

Vacation or more than four (4) consecutive days off must be approved by the manager and Scheduler before booking travel.
Fair Share Policy:

All core providers are expected to work a fair share of days, nights, weekends, and holidays.
Holidays and Popular Vacation Times:

Certain dates like New Year's Day, Memorial Day, Thanksgiving, etc., are considered holidays, and time off may be restricted.
Shift Swapping:

Providers can swap shifts but must notify SCP Health via the mySCP application.
Schedule Creation and Distribution:
Publishing:
Finalized schedules are published in Qgenda and sent to on-call Provider Coverage Coordinators (PCCs) at least two weeks before the start of the month.
Communication:
For emergencies, contact the SCP Health Answering Service at 1-337-572-0374.
For non-emergencies, use the mySCP app or contact your Scheduler during business hours.
Provider Responsibilities:
Providers are responsible for their scheduled shifts and must notify the Scheduler of any changes.
If a provider cancels a confirmed shift, they may be financially responsible for bonuses required to fill the shift.
If you need further clarification or have a specific question about the schedule, such as requesting time off or handling shift changes, let me know!

Here is the detailed information regarding the monthly schedule for clinicians:

Key Points About Monthly Schedules:

Submission of Availability:

Notify your Scheduler of unavailable dates at least 90 days before the scheduled month.
Example: Availability for April is due by January 1.

Availability Preferences:

Provide no more than six (6) dates off per month, including a maximum of one (1) weekend.
Open availability is preferred when possible.

Vacation and Extended Leave:

Vacation or more than four (4) consecutive days off must be approved by the manager and Scheduler before booking travel.

Fair Share Policy:

All core providers are expected to work a fair share of days, nights, weekends, and holidays.

Holidays and Popular Vacation Times:

Certain dates like New Year's Day, Memorial Day, Thanksgiving, etc., are considered holidays, and time off may be restricted.

Shift Swapping:

Providers can swap shifts but must notify SCP Health via the mySCP application.
Schedule Creation and Distribution:
Publishing:
Finalized schedules are published in Qgenda and sent to on-call Provider Coverage Coordinators (PCCs) at least two weeks before the start of the month.
Communication:
For emergencies, contact the SCP Health Answering Service at 1-337-572-0374.
For non-emergencies, use the mySCP app or contact your Scheduler during business hours.
Provider Responsibilities:
Providers are responsible for their scheduled shifts and must notify the Scheduler of any changes.
If a provider cancels a confirmed shift, they may be financially responsible for bonuses required to fill the shift.

If you need further clarification or have a specific question about the schedule, such as requesting time off or handling shift changes, let me know!

UAT Bug: C&CUAT45 Asked scripted question 'schedule for the month' and did not get the schedule, however, did get: Here is the detailed information regarding the monthly schedule for clinicians

1|i0gcyv: 17/Nov/25 8:23 PM Tester: Abby Stutes

Persona: Clinician Experience Specialist

Test Case ID: AF-009

Description: Unable to find executed contracts on selected service line. Assuming I use the account that is set up in testing- West Tennessee Healthcare Milan Hospital.

1. From the console, click the Agentforce Agent icon to start a chat (to the right of the global search bar)
2. Type "Initiate a rate change notice at <Hospital / Service Line A >"
3. When the agent asks for for details to verify, please provide service line name or Global ID
4. If multiple Service Lines are returned, select 1 and click "Submit"
5. Confirm your selection
6. If multiple Contracts are returned, select 1 and click 'Submit"
7. Confirm your selection

*Blocked at step 8*
8. Review the list of Clinicians actively working with that service line
9. Select/Deselect Clinicians for which you'd like to generate the notice for (ONLY SELECT FULL TIME NPPA CLINICIANS)
10. Click "Submit"
11. Then Type "Generate PReview letters" for Previewing notice letter sample. (Should not miss this step)
12. Once agent returns Notice Preview, click on each link to review (Click the Link > Files Tab> Click on each file to preview)
13. Confirm Preview Letters by typing "Yes"
*receive confirmation that the request has been submitted"

Expected vs Actual

"5. Agent provides a list of impacted Clinicians (Active HPF at given service line) with ability to select/deselect as appropriate
6. Agent generates notice preview for for only the full time NPPA clinician template.
7. User can click on Preview Letter link(s) and confirm information
8. Agent generates documents for all impacted clinicians based on confirmed preview
9. Clinicians receive email with appropriate notice attached
10. Agent deactivates the current clinician Contract for the selected clinicians
11. Agent clones the deativated Contract and adds the new rates, bypassing any approvals for the selected clinicians
12. Agent attaches the document to the respective Clinician's new Contract record in the Files related list
13. Agent should create a closed Task with the Subject = "Email - Clinician Rate Change Notice"
14. User receives confirmation email that records have been updated"

UAT Bug: C&CUAT44 Facility Rate Change Notice - Full Cohort (NPPA Only)

None

 marla.pilpel 0 marla.pilpel Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 31/Oct/25 9:30 AM   3 image-20251028-211307.png 28/Oct/25 1:39 PM SCP Sprint 11 28/Oct/25 5:14 PM The block in executing the Clinician Rate Change Notice workflow was caused by a *deficiency in the pre-execution testing phase and setup practice*, not a code defect.

The test execution was blocked because the specific account being used in the *UAT2 environment lacked the prerequisite contract records* necessary to proceed past Step 8 (generating the clinician list).
Testing: Inadequate Testing
1|i0gcx3: 17/Nov/25 8:23 PM Tester: Abby Stutes

Persona: Clinician Experience Specialist

Test Case ID: AF-008

Description: Unable to find executed contracts on selected service line. Assuming I use the account that is set up in testing- West Tennessee Healthcare Milan Hospital.

1. From the console, click the Agentforce Agent icon to start a chat (to the right of the global search bar)
2. Type "Initiate a rate change notice at <Hospital / Service Line A >"
3. When the agent asks for details to verify, please provide service line name or Global ID
4. If multiple Service Lines are returned, select 1 and click "Submit"
5. Confirm your selection
6. If multiple Contracts are returned, select 1 and click 'Submit"
7. Confirm your selection

Blocked on #8, no return of clinician list



5. Agent provides a list of impacted Clinicians (Active HPF at given service line) with ability to select/deselect as appropriate
6. Agent generates notice preview for each of the templates (there are two templates - one for Full Time NPPA, one for all other employee types)
7. User can click on Preview Letter link(s) and confirm information
8. Agent generates documents for all impacted clinicians based on confirmed preview
9. Clinicians receive email with appropriate notice attached
10. Agent deactivates Cancels the current clinician Contract for the selected clinicians
11. Agent clones the deativated Current Contract and adds the new rates, bypassing any approvals for the selected clinicians
12. Agent attaches the document to the respective Clinician's new Contract record in the Files related list
13. Agent should create a closed Task with the Subject = "Email - Clinician Rate Change Notice"
14. User receives confirmation email that records have been updated

UAT Bug: C&CUAT43 Facility Rate Change Notice (Mixed)

None
 
06/Nov/25 9:12 AM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Agentforce Done   Medium Code-Deployment, SCPAgentforce, SCPUATTicket   Tyler Anderson Closed Agentforce PR1050558-3787
No permission
 marla.pilpel 0 marla.pilpel 2 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 06/Nov/25 9:12 AM   4 Abby Stutes AF-007.png 28/Oct/25 1:34 PM SCP Sprint 11 28/Oct/25 6:13 PM The defect in EMR information retrieval was caused by a *logic error* in the application's data lookup and matching process.

* *Logic Failure:* The original system logic, when provided with a clinician's Global ID, was *unable to accurately identify or map to the corresponding Hospital Account* when using common search parameters (such as nickname or full name). This failure prevented users from accessing the correct EMR data.
* *Resolution:* The fix involved *refining the data retrieval logic* to successfully extract the *Facility Global ID from the HPF records*. This improved process now allows the system to accurately locate the necessary hospital account and present a list for user selection, thereby enabling correct EMR data access.
Coding: Logic Errors
1|i0gcwv: 29/Jan/26 9:04 PM Tester: Abby Stutes

Persona:

Test Case ID: AF-007

Description: Open Agentforce on clinician page, still prompted for clinician global ID to access EMR system being used. Could not identify based on global ID. Listed the hospital account by nickname- STHS McAllen- could not find. Listed the hospital account by full name minus the service line and was able to retrieve response.

Should have been able to pull info based on clinician information from HPF. I would also like for it to be able to use nicknames as the specialist wouldn't want to pull the full title.

UAT Bug: C&CUAT42 CET EMR retrieval

None
 
06/Nov/25 9:13 AM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Agentforce Done   High Code-Deployment, SCPAgentforce, SCPUATTicket   Tyler Anderson Closed Agentforce PR1050558-3786
No permission
 marla.pilpel 0 marla.pilpel 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 06/Nov/25 9:13 AM   3 Abby Stutes AF-005.png 28/Oct/25 1:31 PM SCP Sprint 11 31/Oct/25 3:39 PM The defect was caused by a *logic error* in the system's process responsible for retrieving and displaying clinician benefits information.

* *Logic Failure:* The automation or code failed to incorporate the necessary logic to *distinguish* between the different clinician types (*IC* versus *W2*) when determining the appropriate benefits guide.
* *Impact:* This resulted in a failure to correctly match the clinician's type with the corresponding benefits, leading to *incorrect details* being shown to the agent for individuals like Addievi Torres.
Coding: Logic Errors
1|i0gcwn: 29/Jan/26 9:04 PM Tester: Abby Stutes

Persona: Clinician Experience Specialist

Test Case ID: AF-005

Description: The details around the benefits should be provided depending on clinician type. I don't see in Addievi Torres's HPF that it identifies if she's an IC v EE clinician. When Agentforce asked to idenify the benefits enrollment process, it did ask for the clinician's global ID and correctly identified but it provided information for IC clinicians and not W2. When asked if there was a guide to send to the clinician it referred to the Clinical Offerings 6.19.2025_.pdf but no link for the specialist to pull.

1. Agentforce chat window opens with an introduction from the Agent
2. Agent prompts to verify the Clinician Name and Global ID
3. Agent cannot assist without the information in test case step 3
4. Agent responds with appropriate information


Type of Questions the Agent can handle in regards to Benefits:

# the benefit enrollment process
# waiting period for health insurance coverage
# how to change benefits and information on insurance plan rates

See above.

Should be able to identify the appropriate benefits guide based on IC or W2 and produce the offerings or direct the specialist to the HR resource.

No permission
 marla.pilpel 0 marla.pilpel 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 31/Oct/25 11:11 AM   4 Screenshot 2025-10-28 at 1.52.51 PM.png 28/Oct/25 1:28 PM SCP Sprint 11 28/Oct/25 2:53 PM The defect in the *Agentforce chat functionality* was caused by a *logic error* in the process designed to handle pay and compensation inquiries.

* *Logic Failure:* The system's logic for fetching policies (such as travel or expense) was structured to fail silently when it did not possess necessary *prerequisite clinician information* (like name and Global ID). Instead of guiding the agent to input this required data or providing a generic policy, the system incorrectly failed to produce any policy output.
* *Resolution:* The fix involved *updating the underlying prompt/logic* to ensure the chat bot properly handles scenarios where specific clinician details are required, thereby allowing the system to successfully retrieve and present the requested policies.
Coding: Logic Errors
1|i0gcw7: 29/Jan/26 9:04 PM Tester: Abby Stutes

Persona: Clinician Experience Specialist

Description: Unable to pull the travel policy or the expense policy

"The travel policy details are not directly available. However, if you have specific questions or need further clarification, feel free to ask!”

1. Agentforce chat window opens with an introduction from the Agent
2. Agent prompts to verify the Clinician Name and Global ID
3. Agent cannot assist without the information in test case step
Type of Questions the Agent can handle in regards to Pay & Compensation:

# providing agreement or contract copy
# breakdown of compensation model
# pay components
# where to update direct deposit information
# travel or expense policy

Should produce the policies or FAQs for both travel and expenses.

06/Nov/25 9:28 AM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Contracting Done   High Enhancement, SCPAgentforce, SCPHealthCloud, SCPUATEnhancement, SCPUATTicket, UATSmokeTesting   PR1050558-2811, PR1050558-3201, PR1050558-4003 Maci Broussard Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-3783
No permission
 marla.pilpel 0 marla.pilpel 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 06/Nov/25 9:28 AM   5 Term Sheet Generated.png 28/Oct/25 1:14 PM SCP Sprint 11, SCP Sprint 12 28/Oct/25 2:04 PM The defect resulting in missing data (e.g., Job Title, HPF, Compensation) on generated term sheets is due to an *incomplete scope in the initial requirements and subsequent implementation* concerning data retrieval rules.

* *Scope Limitation:* The current logic for term sheet generation was implemented only to pull *active HPF data*.
* *Missing Requirement:* The initial design failed to account for or mandate the retrieval of *inactive HPF data*, which is necessary for comprehensive term sheet generation. This gap in the requirement led to the missing fields when the source HPF records were not in an active status.

The long-term fix is dependent on completing the already-planned story *PR1050558-3201*, which will implement the logic to retrieve all HPF records regardless of status. A temporary *workaround* involves manually setting the HPF to an active status to unblock generation, pending approval for the permanent fix.
Requirements: Incomplete Requirements

 marla.pilpel 0 marla.pilpel Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 27/Oct/25 10:37 AM   3 Contract Agrmts - Admin.png 24/Oct/25 1:11 PM SCP Sprint 11 27/Oct/25 9:38 AM The defect was caused by an *incorrect configuration of user permissions or profile settings* in the UAT environment, specifically for the *Clinician Contract Specialist* role (represented by the Matt H profile).

* *System Expectation:* The Clinician Contract Specialist profile requires visibility of the *Contract Agreements related list* on the Contract Record to perform their job, mirroring the access granted to the Admin profile.
* *Configuration Error:* The necessary permissions (e.g., Profile permissions, Page Layout assignments, or permission sets) to display this related list were *missing or incorrectly set* for the target profile in the UAT environment. This restricted the user's ability to see critical information, despite the underlying data existing.

The issue was resolved by identifying and correcting the missing permissions/configurations, thereby granting the Clinician Contract Specialist profile the required visibility.
Deployment and Configuration: Incorrect Configuration

 marla.pilpel 0 marla.pilpel Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 24/Oct/25 4:53 PM   3 image-20251024-190041.png 24/Oct/25 12:47 PM SCP Sprint 11 24/Oct/25 3:01 PM The issue reported regarding the inability to view *bonus details* on the Contract record's main tabs was ultimately a *usability problem*, not a data or system defect.

* *Data Confirmation:* The data was confirmed to exist and was correctly accessible when navigating directly to the associated PCA from the Bonus CPA record.
* *Usability Flaw:* The difficulty in locating this critical information arose because the *Contract UI lacks a clear or direct display mechanism* (e.g., on the Details, Summary, or Related tabs) for bonus details, forcing users to utilize a less intuitive navigation path. This indicates a gap in the application's usability design for quick information retrieval.
User Interface: Usability Problems

1|i0g90f: 29/Jan/26 9:04 PM Issue 1 - The email subject is coming up with <P> tags.

Actual Result - The email subject is coming up with <P> tags.

Expected Result - Ideally only one line spacing should be there.
Actual Result - As of now double line spacing is present.

Issue 3 - The sub points of Pro Forma Model record should be displayed as Sub points /radio buttons. But as of now all the details are coming together.
Expected Result - The radio buttons/ sub points should be displayed.
Actual Result - As of now since no sub points available so as of now in email body its looking its a one piece all together.

Actual Result - As of now email body approval work item record link is not present.

Actual Result - It is instructions so it needs to be modified with respect to AC.

Issue 6 - As soon as VP BD Finance, COO, CFO, Sales VP Growth approves/ rejects the record, the status of Pro forma model record and the pro forma status field on opportunity record is being updated, ideally once all the roles including deal team members roles approve/rejects it then only status should be updated.

Actual Result - Status is getting updated before only as soon as VP BD Finance, COO, CFO, SVP Growth, approves/ rejects the record.

Expected Result - The Dam Approval process should work and AWI records should be created.
Actual Result - The Dam Approval process is not working as no AWI records are getting created.

-Expected Result - If the user rejects the AWI Record, then its comments should be reflected under the Approval History tab.-
-Actual Result - As of now it is not being reflected, If the user rejects the AWI Record, then its comments should be reflected under the Approval History tab.-

1|i0g8mf: 29/Jan/26 9:04 PM Tester: Maci Broussard

Persona: Recruiter

Test Case ID: REC-0021

Description: HPF was created when a candidate was moved from Interview to Offer but it's missing the Facility Title and Contract Record cannot get created (i.e. blank screen).

1. Log in as Lacie Massingill
2. Navigate to Job 00001

 marla.pilpel 0 marla.pilpel 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 07/Nov/25 3:07 PM   3 EE FT NPPA Blend Calc (Jason Itson).png 23/Oct/25 3:00 PM SCP Sprint 11 24/Oct/25 12:04 PM The reported discrepancy in the calculation of blended salary and overage rates was not a defect in the code but arose from a *misunderstanding of the approved calculation methodology.*

* *Misconception:* The initial expectation and formula used for testing (and initial calculation) varied from the method defined in the acceptance criteria.
* *Intended Logic Confirmed:* Discussions confirmed the implementation correctly follows the approved method, which is to *average the rates across all relevant facilities* (as opposed to averaging the facility-specific averages).
* *Future Enhancement:* While the current implementation aligns with the original story, the slight observed variance points toward a need for a *refinement of the accepted methodology* to ensure greater business accuracy (e.g., proper exclusion of night shift bonuses). This future work has been scoped out under new story *[PR1050558-3779]*.

Since the existing code meets the documented requirements, the issue was closed as the confusion regarding the calculation logic was clarified.
Requirements: Misunderstood Requirements
1|i0g7hz: 29/Jan/26 9:04 PM Tester: Maci Broussard

Persona:

Test Case ID: n/a

Description:

Reviewing a blended FT Salary rate and overage rate for an EE FT NP and it looks a little off. Can we review to make sure this is being calculated correctly?

Request includes the below sites with rates:
FT Tier 120
LewisGale MC - HM: $75/hr
LewisGale Pulaski HM: $80/hr
LewisGale Montgomery HM: $75/hr



1. Log in as Lacie Massingill
2. Create Contract Record for Jason Itson
3. Select FT Tier of 120
4. Configure standard rates for all 3 locations
5. Review calculated blended salary and overage rate



Actual Result:
Monthly Blended: $9,230.40
EE NP/PA Full Time Overage Rate: $78.92

Expected Result:
Monthly Blended: $9,200.00
EE NP/PA Full Time Overage Rate: $78.67

Below is what I thought the calculations where - maybe they were updated?
FT Tier 120
LewisGale MC - HM: $75/hr x 120 = $9000
LewisGale Pulaski HM: $80/hr x 120 = $9600
LewisGale Montgomery HM: $75/hr x 120 = $9000

$9000+$9000+$9600= 27600 / 3 = $9200
$9200/120= $76.67 + 2 = $78.67

Record Links: [https://corehc--uat2.sandbox.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Contract/800bf00000KK3FyAAL/view?ws=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FAccount%2F001bf00000QJ27KAAT%2Fview|https://corehc--uat2.sandbox.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Contract/800bf00000KK3FyAAL/view?ws=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FAccount%2F001bf00000QJ27KAAT%2Fview]

UAT Bug: C&CUAT27 EE NPPA Salary Calculation Incorrect/Needs Review

None
 
24/Oct/25 6:51 PM   Done Provider Contracting Cannot Reproduce 01/Apr/26 3:26 PM High SCPUATTicket, UATSmokeTesting, WorkingAsExpected   PR1050558-1750, PR1050558-3325 Maci Broussard Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-3673

 marla.pilpel 0 marla.pilpel Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 24/Oct/25 6:51 PM   4 23/Oct/25 2:56 PM SCP Sprint 11 23/Oct/25 3:33 PM The reported visibility issue regarding VPO approval on the Contract Record was determined to be a result of a *misunderstanding of the defined approval assignment logic*, not a technical defect.

* *Misconception:* The bug reporter expected the approval notification or work item to be visible to an individual who was not the designated approver (Maci Broussard).
* *Intended Logic Confirmed:* The Salesforce team confirmed the system is operating as designed: when multiple team members are assigned the *VP Operations role*, the approval is intentionally routed to the *most recently added member*. Furthermore, when multiple service accounts are involved, the approval is sent only to the VPO relevant to the facility in question.

Since the system's behavior was confirmed to align with the current design specifications, the reported issue was *not reproducible as a bug*.
Requirements: Misunderstood Requirements

 marla.pilpel The IP CreatePreventiveCareAgreementRecords is used by two Omniscripts ( Clinician ConfigureRates and ServiceAccFacilityRateCreation). As part of the changes for *ServiceAccFacilityRateCreation*, a flag isShiftCoverage was passed over and checked at the step DM_CreatePCAForNotLocumTypeOfRate. The check was {{%isShiftCoverageChange% != "true"}} in QA and {{%isShiftCoverageChange% == "false"}} , in UAT
because this flag is not sent, it would be null and hence the == false did not work. so it did not create the PCA. The fix will be made to check for != true ( we can also check for == null) 		0 marla.pilpel 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 24/Oct/25 5:41 PM   4 Summary - Bonus Config.png 22/Oct/25 4:34 PM SCP Sprint 11 23/Oct/25 8:16 AM data setup

2-Navigate to Tasks object from app launcher and change list views from Recently Viewed to Compliance Queue.
3-Verify following columns and filters are present for Compliance Queue as follows:-

Columns-
Subject

Name (blank if not related to a clinician)

Related To

Due Date

Status

Priority

Type

Assigned Alias

Last Modified Date/Time

Last Modified By Alias

Filters -
Task Record Type = Default, Filter by Owner = Compliance Queue

Issue - The Column Type is missing and under List Views Filter the Task Record Type = Default is not present.
Please find below all the list view:-

1-Compliance Queue  = Column, Type is missing and Filter - Task Record type - default missing.

13- Data Quality - Column, Type is missing and Filter - Task Record type - default missing.
14 - Connected Care Queue - Column, Type is missing and Filter - Task Record type - default missing.

The Column Type is missing and under List Views Filter the Task Record Type = Default is not present.

1.Create IC Clinician record
2.Create HPF

23/Oct/25 8:28 AM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Offboarding Done   High SCPSITTicket   Aditya Tiwari Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-3569
No permission
 marla.pilpel 0 marla.pilpel 2 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 23/Oct/25 8:28 AM   7 image-20251023-121124.png 15/Oct/25 11:16 AM SCP Sprint 11 16/Oct/25 10:23 AM The defect was caused by *incomplete data handling* during the firing of the Salesforce Platform Event for IC Terminations.

Specifically:

# The downstream integration system (*MuleSoft*) requires critical fields, such as *Tax ID* and *Reason*, to successfully process the IC termination event.
# The Salesforce Platform Event payload was *not configured to include these required fields*, resulting in the MuleSoft flow failing due to missing data.

This was not a loss of source data, but an error in the *packaging/construction of the data payload* for the integration message. The fix involved correctly updating the event payload to include all necessary fields ({{Reason_Description__c}} and {{Tax_Id__c}}), as outlined in the solution from User Story 2462. The issue has been verified and confirmed as resolved.
Data: Incorrect Data Handling
1|i0ft3r: 08/Feb/26 4:09 PM Tester: Aditya Tiwari

Persona: Recruiter

Integration Interface: Provider Termination/Offboarding for ICs (SF HC->WD)

2)Complete SCP offboarding case and check for the event.

*Actual Result:* Event is received from SF HC, but Tax ID and Reason is missing in the event payload, refer below screenshot for the payload received

Expected Result: Received event should have all the necessary fields required by MuleSoft to terminate the IC

*Tax_Id and Reason_Description are missing*

SIT: C&CSIT04 SCP Termination event is received for IC but with insufficient data in the payload which is sent from SF HC

      QA: [https://corehc--qa.sandbox.my.salesforce.com?so=00DgP0000001nmf|https://corehc--qa.sandbox.my.salesforce.com/?so=00DgP0000001nmf] 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Clinician *with* a Federation ID
Given I am an Clinician with an active user record where Federation ID (Is Single Sign-On Enabled = true) on my user record *is* populated
When I navigate to the HC Portal login screen
Then I shall have the ability to input an email address
And if I am an active Clinician with a Federation ID (Is Single Sign-On Enabled = true), then I can Sign in with Okta to access the HC Portal

AC2: Clinician *without* a Federation ID
Given I am a Clinician with an active user record where Federation ID (Is Single Sign-On Enabled = true) on my user record *is* *NOT* populated
When I navigate to the HC Portal login screen
Then I shall have the ability to input an email address
And if I am an active Clinician without a Federation ID (Is Single Sign-On Enabled = true), then I can Sign in with the Password I manually created.





NOTE: per Jose, Okta will NOT update the User’s ‘Email’, Okta will just update the ‘Federation ID’. 		08/Dec/25 9:38 AM   7 Screenshot 2025-10-27 at 5.48.15 PM.png 14/Oct/25 3:04 PM SCP Sprint 12.1 (UAT), SCP Sprint 11, SCP Sprint 12 17/Oct/25 3:24 PM 1|i0frwf: 29/Jan/26 9:04 PM As an Active Clinician, if I have been provisioned Okta access, then I need to login to the Health Cloud portal through SSO, so that I can easily login without using personal email and password to login

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3557, PR1050558-3558 [https://lucid.app/lucidchart/3e2874f0-f9bf-4fa1-8510-7474dc192fb4/edit?viewport_loc=685%2C-134%2C3062%2C1543%2C0_0&invitationId=inv_16c3408e-a23f-43cc-b337-68cc38c29be9|https://lucid.app/lucidchart/3e2874f0-f9bf-4fa1-8510-7474dc192fb4/edit?viewport_loc=685%2C-134%2C3062%2C1543%2C0_0&invitationId=inv_16c3408e-a23f-43cc-b337-68cc38c29be9|smart-link]

Record triggered flow on Contract
When executed and RecordType is Clinician, and User associated with Clinician person account does not have fedId
Then create platform event
All the fields mentioned exist on Clinician Person account in DD.
For address - user Mailing address’s zip code.

Create new platform event object - Clinician Onboarding
PE Record / Channel - Okta Onboarding
Value for Type - Okta Onboarding


Since we the Encrypted field Type cannot be changed, create a new field and re point the field in all location that SSN Locked is referred. Communicate to SCP about the new field and ask Brian Lavin to add the SSN Locked to the field cleanup list 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1:
Given I am an Integration User in the HC org
When a Contract record where Record Type = ‘Clinician’ AND Status = ‘Executed’ AND ‘Federation ID’ is not populated (send once per clinician)
Create a custom Platform Event with the following:

* Platform Event, Name = Clinician Onboarding
** Global Provider Id
** SSN (last 4 digits)
** Zipcode
** Phone

Assumptions:

* API handles duplicates
* We are only creating platform event when “Federation ID” is blank. Clinician Offboarding process should be clearing the Federation ID on the user record and deactivating the user in SF.
* Okta will update the User’s ‘Federation ID’ & 'Email'

Given I am a system administrator
When a user completes a guided experience to clone an executed *Practice Operations* or *Clinician Contract* record
Then the system shall rest/clear the following *Preventive Care Agreement (PCA)* Change Management flags (fields) on the newly created contract record:

* Existing Rate Increased?
* Existing Rate Decreased?
* New Shift Type Added?
* New Shift Bonus Type Added?
* Existing Shift Type Added?
* Is Newly Added?
* Systematically Copied from Previous Contract (not Cloned)?
* -Rate Pay Code Added?-
* -Rate Pay Code Remove?-
* Is Deleted (Records with Is Deleted Should not be cloned)

AC2: Reset *Rate Pay Code* Change Management flags
Given I am a system administrator
When a user completes a guided experience to clone an executed *Practice Operations* or *Clinician Contract* record
Then the system shall rest/clear the following *Rate Pay Code* Change Management flags (fields) on the newly created contract record:

* Is Newly Added?
* Is Deleted (Records with Is Deleted Should not be cloned)

AC3: Reset *Shift* Change Management flags
Given I am a system administrator
When a user completes a guided experience to clone an executed *Practice Operations* or *Clinician Contract* record
Then the system shall rest/clear the following *Shift* Change Management flags (fields) on the newly created contract record:

* Existing Shift Type Added?
* New Shift Type Added?
* Is Deleted (Records with Is Deleted Should not be cloned)

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-3481, PR1050558-3499 * Apples for Both Practice Operation Contract and Clinician Contract
* For each *Contract Payment Agreement* records select query all related Shift__c records *Preventive Care Agreement* records and count based on logic below and update the count into the *Contract Payment Agreement.Mixed_Bag_Shift_Rates__c* records using PreventiveCareAgreement.ContractPaymentAgreementId
** Mixed Bag Shift Rates
*** For one of the FacilityTitle__c if Max(Rate__c) != MIN(Rate__c) then Set the Mixed Bag Shift Rates = 1
**** Query:SELECT FacilityTitle__c, Shift__r.Shift_Name__c, Max(Rate__c), MIN(Rate__c) FROM ContractPaymentAgreement WHERE Shift__r.Shift_Name__r.Code != “Shift Bonus” AND
GROUP BY FacilityTitle__c, Shift__r.Shift_Name__c



Day 1 = 100, *Mixed_Bag_Shift_Rates__c* = 0

Day 2 = 100, *Mixed_Bag_Shift_Rates__c* = 0

Day 3= 100, *Mixed_Bag_Shift_Rates__c* = 0

Night 1 = 120, *Mixed_Bag_Shift_Rates__c* = 0

Night 2 = 120, *Mixed_Bag_Shift_Rates__c* = 0

→ *Mixed_Bag_Shift_Rates__c = 0*

*(Query Output [1] Day , 100, 100| [1] Night , 120, 120)*

PCA

Day 1 = 100, *Mixed_Bag_Shift_Rates__c* = 1

Day 2 = 120 , *Mixed_Bag_Shift_Rates__c* = 1

Day 3= 90, *Mixed_Bag_Shift_Rates__c* = 1

Night 1 = 120, *Mixed_Bag_Shift_Rates__c* = 0

Night 2 = 120, *Mixed_Bag_Shift_Rates__c* = 0

→ *Mixed_Bag_Shift_Rates__c = 1*

*(Query Output [1] Day , 120, 100| [1] Night , 120, 120)* 		0 Jasmine Moradi 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a system administrator within the Corporate Support apps

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3485, PR1050558-3503 Run the Job around 9 PM every day

Change the starting point of the Batch Job from Contract to Client Change Management record.



# Pick the records from Client_Change_Management__c.Contract.StartDate - 1 <= Today() AND Client_Change_Management__c.Process_Type__c = Automation AND Status__c = New
# Update the Clinician Contract related to the HPF (Code should already exist for [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2916|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2916|smart-link] and [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3187|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3187|smart-link] )
# In the Finally section update back the Status of Client_Change_Management__c.Status__c = Completed
# In for any error log the error in Error Log object
## Error_Message__c = Actual Error Message
## Error_Type__c = Apex
## Source_Component__c = Apex Name
## Record_Id__c = Client_Change_Management__c.id
## Error_Timestamp__c = Time
## Stack_Trace__c = Apex Stack Trace 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Update batch job for Clinician Contract updates
Given I am a System Administrator

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-3429, PR1050558-3515 Scheduled Flow on Contract

Look for Clinician RT: Clinician, Employee_Type__c = “Independent Contractor” and Contract.EndDate = Today() and Clinician*.*Account.Professional_Title__pc = _NP or PA_


For Each Contract that is expiring today

Step 1: Get all HPF Records that is part of the expiring Clinician Contract
Step 2: See if any of the HPF Records has Contract extend

# Query ProviderNetworkContract.Contract.Contract.StartDate > Today() and Status = “Executed” and ProviderNetworkContract.Employee_Type__c = “Independent Contractor” AND ContractorProviderNetworkContract.Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__c in HPF In from Step 1
# If Query return no records
## Update the expiring Contract Status: if no records are found in Step 2.1 then [Expiring]ContractStatus = Canceled and [Expiring]Cancel_Reason__c = Terminated
## Creating Cases when Terminating Employee:
### Create a Case RT: Clinician Offboarding, Type: Facility cases & tasks for the each HPF
#### -All Child Cases with ‘Status’ = Closed, ‘Closed Reason’ = Complete-
#### All Tasks with ‘Status’ = Canceled
### {color:#ff5630}Check if Clinician has any other active HPF (that is not expiring) Select Id from HealthcarePractitionerFacility WHERE PractitionerId = Clinician{color}{color:#ff5630}*.*{color}{color:#ff5630}AccountId and Id not in (HPFId in Step 1) AND Status != “Inactice”{color}
#### {color:#ff5630}if No record returned{color}
##### {color:#ff5630}Create a Case RT: Clinician Offboarding, Type: SCP cases & tasks {color}
##### {color:#ff5630}All Tasks with ‘Status’ = Canceled{color}
#### {color:#ff5630}else do nothing{color}
## Update the Each HPF in Step 1
### Status = Inactive
### Effective To = date the automation ran
### Termination Date = date the automation ran
# If Query return records the check if any of the HPF Id in Step 1 is not part of the extended Contract and get those HPFIds
## Update the expiring Contract Status: if records are found in Step 2.2 then [Expiring]ContractStatus = Canceled and [Expiring]Cancel_Reason__c = Superseded
## Create a Case RT: Clinician Offboarding, Type: Facility cases & tasks for the each HPF
### -All Child Cases with ‘Status’ = Closed, ‘Closed Reason’ = Complete-
### All Tasks with ‘Status’ = Canceled
## Update the Each HPF in Step 3
### Status = Inactive
### Effective To = date the automation ran
### Termination Date = date the automation ran 		0 Jasmine Moradi 13 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Clinician Contracting Specialist in the corporate support apps

{color:#403294}And the system shall automatically update the following:{color}

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3496, PR1050558-3514, PR1050558-3317 Update the record triggered flow [Task After Flow|https://corehc--dev1.sandbox.my.salesforce-setup.com/builder_platform_interaction/flowBuilder.app?flowId=3017x00001NS9PHAA1]

# When the Task.Status is updated to Completed or Canceled or Open check if the Task is part of Action Plan by running a query on ActionPlanItem.ActionPlanId = <TaskId> AND ItemEntityType = Task
# If this is part of an Action Plan (if Step 1 return a Query)
## ActionPlanItem.ActionPlanId is the Action Plan Id
## Look if the Status of the Action Plan is “In Progress”
## if not update the Action Plan status = “In Progress”
# Get the number of Task Closed and Open for the Action Plan
## Get All ActionPlanItem.ItemId records for that ActionPlanItem.ActionPlanId
## Query Task based on All ActionPlanItem.ItemId
## Count No of Task that are “Open”, “Completed” (Note: We are ignoring any cancelled task if any)
## Sum “Open” + “Completed” to calculate Total Tasks
# Look if the Action Plan Id is stored as part of PMT Task (inov8__PMT_Task__c.Related_Action_Plan__c) if found a match then update with below details
## inov8__PMT_Task__c.Total_Tasks__c = step 3.d
## inov8__PMT_Task__c.No_of_Completed_Tasks__c = step 3.c ( count “Completed”)
## inov8__PMT_Task__c.inov8__Percentage_Completion__c = count “Completed” / step 3.d “Total”



Check OOTB Flow Template as reference *Update Action Plan Status* 		0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Auto update the PMT Task (Milestone) “Task Completion %” field
Given I am a Implementation Specialist in the Corporate Support Apps
When I updated the PMT Task “Task Status” = ‘In Progress' (AC1)
And the system auto executed the Action Plan Template
Then the system shall update the PMT Task’s “Task Completion %” field based on each Task status in the Action Plan is updated:

* ”# of Completed Tasks” divided by “Total Tasks” to calculate the percentage (Ignore the Cancelled Task if any).
* “No. of Completed Tasks” update the task when each Action Plan Task is completed

And when the all the Action Plan Tasks are completed
Then the system shall update the PMT Task “Task Completion %” field = 100%

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3313, PR1050558-3490, PR1050558-3508

* Then *on the 'Start Date'* of the *new* Executed Practice Operations Contract, the system will automatically update the active contract’s:
** Use scheduled Flow that run every DAY that update the Contract Record → Record Type: Practice Operation
** *Entry Criteria:* Contract Records that has Contract.Status = “Executed” and Contract.StartDate = batch run date i.e. Today() AND Contract.RecordType=“Practice Operation” (this will be the current Contract)
** For each Contract record get the previous contract by using the Contract.AcocuntId = current.Contract.AcocuntId and Contract.Id <> current.Contract.Id AND Contract.StartDate < current.Contract.StartDate and Contract.Status = “Executed” AND Contract.RecordType=“Practice Operation” Order BY Contract.StartDate LIMIT 1
** Set the Contract.EndDate = current.Contract.StartDate -1 and Contract.Status = Superseded and update each Contract related to that ServiceAccount
** Batch need to run after 12 AM on that day
* And if the ‘Start Date' of the *new* Executed Practice Operations Contract is *in the past* (Start Date is less than today’s date)
** Use are record triggered flow in Contract Contract Record → Record Type: Practice Operation and Contract.Status = “Executed” and Contract.StartDate <= Today()
** For Contract record get the previous contract by using the Contract.AcocuntId = current.Contract.AcocuntId and [Contract.Id|http://Contract.Id] <> [current.Contract.Id|http://current.Contract.Id] AND Contract.StartDate < current.Contract.StartDate and Contract.Status = “Executed” AND Contract.RecordType=“Practice Operation” Order BY Contract.StartDate LIMIT 1
** Set the Contract.EndDate = current.Contract.StartDate -1 and Contract.Status = Superseded and update each Contract related to that ServiceAccount 		0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support apps
When a Service Account has an active *Practice Operations* Contract, active is defined as:

* ‘Start Date' less than or equal to today’s date
* ‘Status’ equals “Executed”
* ‘End Date’ is blank/No End Date OR End Date is greater (future) OR equal to today’s date

And the Service Account gets a *new* Executed Practice Operations Contract (‘Status’ equals “Executed”)

Then *on the 'Start Date'* of the *new* Executed Practice Operations Contract, the system will automatically update the active contract’s:

* ‘End Date’ = [New Executed Contract’s Start Date minus 1 day]
* ‘Status’ = “Superseded” (new status added in [+PR1050558-2924+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2924])

And if the ‘Start Date' of the *new* Executed Practice Operations Contract is *in the past* (Start Date is less than today’s date)

Then the system shall *immediately* update the active contract’s:

* ‘End Date’ = [New Executed Contract’s Start Date minus 1 day]
* ‘Status’ = “Superseded” (new status added in [+PR1050558-2924+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2924]) 		29/Oct/25 5:12 PM   3 25/Sep/25 6:33 PM SCP Sprint 11 16/Oct/25 1:56 PM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzzyr 02/Mar/26 8:44 PM As a SFO user, on the Start Date of a newly Executed Practice Operations contract, I want the system to automatically update the current Executed Practice Operations contract’s ‘End Date’ to the new contract's Start Date minus 1 day and update the ‘Status’ to “Superseded”, so that I can ensure proper contract management.

Facility Change Request: Practice Operation Contract - Auto End Date

None

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3312, PR1050558-3491, PR1050558-3509 Create List View as per AC 0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project NOTE: This story is just to create the list views, so that when the onboarding/SUN tasks are created and assigned to a queue, then queue users can view and work tasks. See the linked work items for related stories for task creation.

AC1: Add New task queue list views
As a system administrator within the Corporate Support apps
When the onboarding/SUN process starts and tasks are generated
Then the following Task Queue List Views shall be available with the following columns:

* Subject
* Name (blank if not related to a clinician)
* Related To
* Due Date
* Status
* Priority
* Type
* Assigned Alias
* Last Modified Date/Time
* Last Modified By Alias

|*List View Queue Name:*|*Filters:* Task Record Type = Default, Filter by Owner = <queue name>|
|Compliance Queue|Task Record Type = Default, Filter by Owner = Compliance Queue|
|Data Acquisition Queue|Task Record Type = Default, Filter by Owner = Data Acquisition Queue|
|Treasury Queue|Task Record Type = Default, Filter by Owner = Treasury Queue|
|Account Setup Queue|Task Record Type = Default, Filter by Owner = Account Setup Queue|
|HR Queue|Task Record Type = Default, Filter by Owner = HR Queue|
|Payroll Queue|Task Record Type = Default, Filter by Owner = Payroll Queue|
|Field Ops Assignment Queue|Task Record Type = Default, Filter by Owner = Field Ops Assignment Queue|
|Clinician Experience Team Queue|Task Record Type = Default, Filter by Owner = Clinician Experience Team Queue|
|MSL-CC Queue|Task Record Type = Default, Filter by Owner = MSL-CC Queue|
|Clinical Operations Queue|Task Record Type = Default, Filter by Owner = Clinical Operations Queue|
|BD Enablement Queue|Task Record Type = Default, Filter by Owner = BD Enablement Queue|
|Managed Care Queue|Task Record Type = Default, Filter by Owner = Managed Care Queue|
|Data Quality|Task Record Type = Default, Filter by Owner = Data Quality|
|Connected Care Queue|Task Record Type = Default, Filter by Owner = Connected Care Queue| 		03/Nov/25 2:19 PM   3 25/Sep/25 3:12 PM SCP Sprint 11, SCP Sprint 12 17/Oct/25 4:32 AM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzzlxb 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM As a system administrator, I need queue list views to support the onboarding/SUN process, so that the assigned users can view and manage the tasks within them.

Contract Id = Clinician Contract Id (where the update was performed)

global facilityId = ServiceAccount.GlobalFacilityId, 
GlobalProviderId = Clinician.GlobalProviderId,
HPF Id = HPF Id

AC3: Platform event trigger for HPFTrigger (HPFUpdates__e) for Qgenda
Given I am SFO within the Corporate Support Apps
When a *Clinician Contract* record gets automatically updated based on AC1 or AC2

And the system shall support 3187 Rate Pay Code delete scenario. 		31/Oct/25 1:11 PM   4 Screenshot 2025-10-14 at 6.33.41 PM.png 24/Sep/25 9:32 PM SCP Sprint 11, SCP Sprint 12 24/Sep/25 9:32 PM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzzlzzzcrzzzi 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM As a SFO, I want the system to automatically update all related Clinician executed Contracts based on specific type of updates made to the *Practice Operations* contract record, so that Clinician Contracts stay in sync with the Client contract and contract generation in Qgenda can be appropriately triggered.

* *Coverage Change - Only Shift changes*: no new shift record created. New Shift is add with the same Type and same Rate. [See story [+PR1050558-2916+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2916]]
* *Pay Code Change*: Only paycode change, new paycode added to shift (no rate change) [See story [+PR1050558-3187+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3187]+]+ 		10/Oct/25

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3188, PR1050558-3189, PR1050558-3265 As part of the batch class built for 2916, in the start method, we would have gotten the PO CPA where Rate_Pay_Code_Remove_c or Rate_Pay_Code_Added_c > 0.
Add method to Get Client RatePayCodes
Query for RatePaycode, where Is_Newly_Added > 0 or Is_Deleted = true.
Get the RatePayCode>PCA>Shift>Shift_Full_Name__c Code and RatePayCode.PayCodeName

Add method to match the Clinician Shift PCA
Match the PO RatePayCode using the Shift_Full_Name__c with the existing Clinician PCA > shift>Shift_Full_Name__c and PO.RatePayCode > PCA > FacilityTitle with Clinician PCA.FacilityTitle
For the matched Clinician PCA

to add RatePayCode
if PO RatePayCode has Is_Newly_Added true , create a new rate paycode for clinician PCA and insert
to delete RatePayCode
if PO RatePayCode has Is_Deleted to true, query for the ratePaycode by matching the RatePayCode.PayCodeName and delete the record from clinician PCA.

 0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Coverage Change - new shift with same shift type and same rate [See story [+PR1050558-2916+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2916]]

AC2: Rate Pay Code Change - New pay code added to Shift (no Rate Changes)
Given I am an SFO within the Corporate Support Apps
When I clone a *Practice Operations contract* in Status = Executed
And I add new *Rate Pay Code(s)* to Shift(s)
And No rate changes have occurred
Then the cloned Practice Operations contract Status gets updated to Status = “Executed” & Start Date equals current date, the system shall automatically Add the Rate Pay Code to all related *Clinician* contracts meeting the following criteria:

* Clinician Contract Status ≠ Canceled
* HPF Service Account matches Practice Operations Contract’s Service Account

Note: Before the Practice Agreement Contract Status = Executed, the pay code must be established in Qgenda. (will be addressed as part of the business process within the existing approval process.)

* *-Coverage Change - Only Shift changes-*-: no new shift record created. New Shift is add with the same Type and same Rate.- [See story [+PR1050558-2916+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2916]]
* *Pay Code Change*: Only paycode change, new paycode added to shift (no rate change)

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3094, PR1050558-3030, PR1050558-3283 * Field creation part of [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2924|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2924|smart-link]
* Security -
** Persona that have Edit access PMT = Implementation Specialist
** Permission Set = *Manage Client Onboarding*
*** Follow the Security Matrix for permission

AC1: Create PMT Project (All are from Out of the Box PMT Project Item) & AC2.2: PMT Project - Use this Template & AC2.2: PMT Project - Use this Template

# User Navigates to the PMT Project where IsTemplate? = True
# User use the Use This Template button to Create new PMT Project
# User enters the start date and project name
# user can select the PMT Phase
# user can select the PMT Tasks within the Phase

Once the PMT Project is created user navigates to the PMT Project and setup the Opportunity lookup

Flow: record triggered flow after save in PMT Project that update the Opportunity.PMT_Project__c with the inov8__PMT_Project__c.Id



AC3: PMT Phase

# -Validation Rule: when Account field changes using ISCHANGED and inov8__Project__r.Opportunity__c is blank then error “Service Account can be be setup in Phase when only PMT Project is related to an Opportunity”-
# Flow: When user setup Service_Account__c to PMT Phase check
## if inov8__Project__r.Opportunity__c is blank then error “Service Account can be be setup in Phase when only PMT Project is related to an Opportunity”
## if the Service Account is Part of Service__c using Service__c.Opportunity__c = inov8__Project__r.Opportunity__c AND Service__c.Account__c= inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__c AND Service__c.Status__c = ‘Active’ if no matching service account is found then Error “Service Account must be related to the Opportunity Service and must be in Active Status”
## if no error update the inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__r.Name = inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Name (truncate to 80 chanracters)



AC4: PMT Task

Then on the PMT Task record the user should not be able to update the “Task Status” = “In Progress” if the PMT Phase is missing a “Service Account”.

* Validation Rule: When Status = In Progress AND inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__c is blank then error “Please identify the Service Account associated with the PMT Phase.“

And “IsTemplate?” = False/not checked, then do not allow users to edit the PMT Task field = “Task Name”

* Validation Rule: when inov8__Phase__r.inov8__Project__r.inov8__IsTemplate__c = false and ISCHANGED(inov8__PMT_Task__c.Name)
** Error Message: You cannot edit the Task Name (Milestone). 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Create PMT Project
Given I am a Implementation Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When a user has access to *create a PMT Project*
-Then there should be a related list to the Opportunity-

* -Filter: Record type: Opportunity Growth-
* -Columns to display: Opportunity Name, Stage, Target Contract Start Date, Closed Date, Incremental Margin-

-And- the following tabs visible: Chatter & Activity, Details, Summary, Tasks, Files-, -Related--

User can see have the ability to update the Opportunity in the PMT Project Record using the Opportunity Lookup in Details Tab

When the user relate the Opportunity in the PMT Project the corresponding Opportunity PMT Project gets automatically update by the system

AC2.1: PMT Project - Clone Phases/Tasks
Given I am a Implementation Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When a user has access to *create a PMT Project*
Then from the PMT Project record they should have the ability to “Clone Phases/Tasks” when “IsTemplate”= False

AC2.2: PMT Project - Use this Template
Given I am a Implementation Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When a user has access to *create a PMT Project*
Then from the PMT Project record they should have the ability to “Use this Template” when “IsTemplate”= True

AC3: PMT Phase
Given I am a Implementation Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When a user has access to create *PMT Phase*
Then on the PMT Phase record there should be a field:

* Service Account (lookup to Account RT: Service Account)

And Service Account that is added is related to the opportunity, if not display message:

* Error Message: -Service Account must be related to the Opportunity.- Service Account must be related to the Opportunity Service and must be in Active Status.

And when the “Service Account” is successfully added, then the system shall update the “Phase Name” field with the Service Account Name.

AC4: PMT Task
Given I am a Implementation Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When a user has access to create PMT Task
Then on the PMT Task record the user should not be able to update the “Task Status” = “In Progress” if the PMT Phase is missing a “Service Account”.

* Error Message: Please identify the Service Account associated with the PMT Phase.

And “IsTemplate?” = False/not checked, then do not allow users to edit the PMT Task field = “Task Name”

* Error Message: You cannot edit the Task Name (Milestone).

AC5: View access for internal Corporate Support Users

Given I am a internal Corporate Support User
When I am in the Corporate Support Apps
Than I have the ability to view: PMT Project, PMT Phase, PMT Task, & PMT Gantt View
And I shall have *read only* access to PMT Project, PMT Phase, & PMT Task records



----

31/Oct/25 12:27 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Client 360 Accepted   Low ClientMaintenance, ClinicianImpact, TADesignComplete Jasmine Moradi   PR1050558-4630, PR1050558-3780, PR1050558-4863, PR1050558-4892, PR1050558-4893, PR1050558-4561, PR1050558-4791, PR1050558-3017, PR1050558-3800 Abhinav Mishra Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-3024
No permission
 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3032, PR1050558-3096, PR1050558-3290 When the user clicks the “*Refresh Client Rates*”

Apex Code

# For Each ProviderNetworkContract Record in the Clinician Contract
## Get the latest +relevant+ Practice Operation Contract
### ProviderNetworkContract.Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__r.AccountId = [Contract.AccountId|http://Contract.Id] and [*Contract.*|http://Contract.Id]*StartDate <= ProviderNetworkContract.Contract.StartDate* AND [Contract.|http://Contract.Id]RecordType= Practice Operation and [Contract.|http://Contract.Id]Status = “Executed” Order By [Contract.|http://Contract.Id]StartDate DESC LIMIT 1
### Get all the *Practice Operation* PreventiveCareAgreement record where ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = Stipend OR Shift OR Variable OR Target OR Leadership Incentives and Facility_Title__c = ProviderNetworkContract.Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__r.Facility_Title__c. Loop through each records
#### For ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = “Shift”
##### use When Is_Deleted__c = false use PreventiveCareAgreement.Shift__r.Shift_Full_Name__c-PreventiveCareAgreement.Shift__r.Type__c, PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c, [PreventiveCareAgreement.Id|http://PreventiveCareAgreement.Id] (use a List<String, Map<Id, Number>>) *[Shift Active Records]*
##### use When Is_Deleted__c = true then use PreventiveCareAgreement.Shift__r.Shift_Full_Name__c-PreventiveCareAgreement.Shift__r.Type__c, PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c, [PreventiveCareAgreement.Id|http://PreventiveCareAgreement.Id] (use a List<String, Map<Id, Number>>) *[Shift Deleted Records]*
#### For ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c != “Shift”
##### use When Is_Deleted__c = false use PreventiveCareAgreement.Type__c, PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c (use a List<Id, Map<Id, Number>>) *[Other Type Active Records]*
##### use When Is_Deleted__c = true use PreventiveCareAgreement.Type__c, PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c (use a List<Id, Map<Id, Number>>) *[Other Type Deleted Records]*
## Get all the *Clinician Contract* PreventiveCareAgreement record where -Cloned_From__c != null AND- ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = Stipend OR Shift OR Variable OR Target OR Leadership Incentives and Loop through each records
### Process Shift Records
#### For *[Clinician]* ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = “Shift” use PreventiveCareAgreement.Shift__r.Shift_Full_Name__c-PreventiveCareAgreement.Shift__r.Type__c, PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c compare the Rates from Step 1.a.ii.1 and when the [Practice Operation].PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c > *[Clinician]*PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c then update the *[Clinician]*PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c *(use [Shift Active Records] Map)*
#### If there are any shift that is not available in the Practice Operation Contract then delete the Shift from Clinician Contract *(Use [Shift Deleted Records])*
#### Update the *[Clinician].*Facility_Rate__c to the [*Practice Operation.CAP*].Id *when its same*
### Process Other Records
#### For *[Clinician]* ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c != “Shift” use PreventiveCareAgreement.Type__c, PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c compare the Rates from Step 1.a.ii.2 and when the *[Practice Operation]*.PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c > *[Clinician]*PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c then update the *[Clinician]*PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c *(Use [Other Type Active Records])*
#### If there are any ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c that is not available in the Practice Operation Contract then delete from Clinician Contract *(Use [Other Type Deleted Records])*
#### Update the *[Clinician].*Facility_Rate__c to the [*Practice Operation .CPA*].Id *when its same*
## Once complete update today to Contract.Last_Synched_Date__c

Button should be visibly only for Draft Clinician Contract 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: “*Refresh Client Rates*”

Given I am an Contracting specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When I am on a *Clinician contract in Status = Draft*
Then on the Summary tab, I have the ability to “**Refresh Client Rates**” for *all HPFs Type of Rates*; *except for 'Bonus'*
And for each of the Clinician’s rates,

# The system shall pull in the rate from the relevant Practice Operations contract and populate the “Facility Rate”. (Status = Executed AND Clinician Contract Start Date falls within the Practice Operations Contract Start Date)
# If the “Facility Rate” is greater than the current “Rate”, then system shall update the “Rate”.
# If the system is unable to find a matching Facility Rate / Facility Rate has been removed on the Practice Operations contract, then the system shall *hard delete the rate* on the Clinician contract. (Rate = Preventive Care Agreement record & related Rate Pay Codes)
# When the user selects “Configure Rates” button, then on the ‘Rate Details’ step they are able to to view the updated ‘Facility Rate’ and ‘Rate’ (if #2 was met)
# If Clinician contract Status ≠ Draft, then the system should hide/disable the “**Refresh Client Rates**” button.
# When the user clicks “*Refresh Client Rates*”, then the user can view the Last Synched Date as a timestamp on Summary page of Clinician contract.

AC2: When Contract Record Type = Practice Operation is Status = Abandoned

update all Client Change Management Records where Status = New to Cancelled 		0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Send Notification when there is a Future Practice Operations Contract
Given I am a an SFO within the Corporate Support apps
When a Practice Operations contract Status is updated to Executed
And there is a future dated Practice Operations contract in Status = Executed
Then the system shall automatically generate a task for each contract meeting the above criteria for the SFO so they can make the necessary adjustments

* Task Record Type = ‘Default’
* Subject = A Practice Operations contract has been executed where a future date contract exists
* Assigned To = <Practice Operations Contacting Queue *NEW* - SFO users will be assigned>
* Comments =
”Practice Operations contract number <insert ‘Contract Number’> [link to the record] for Contract Start Date: <Insert ‘Contract Start Date’> has been updated to Status = ‘Executed’. There is a future dated Practice Operations contract number <Insert ‘Contract Number'> [link to the record] for Contract Start Date: <Insert ‘Contract Start Date’> in Status = ‘Executed’.

Please review the newly executed Practice Operations contract and if changes are required to the future dated contract, then perform the following steps:

Step 1: Update the future dated Practice Operations contract status = 'Abandoned’.
Step 2: From the Service Account create a contract using the 'Request Contract Change” guided experience and make updates as needed.”

* Status = ‘Open’
* Priority = ‘Normal’
* Related To = <Practice Operations Contract that was just executed>

AC2: Update Client Change Management records
Given I am a System Administrator
When a Practice Operations contract status is updated to “Abandoned”
Then the system shall locate Client Change Management records meeting the following criteria:

* Related to the Abandoned Practice Operations contract
* Status = New

And for all Client Change Management records meeting the above criteria, the system shall update the Status to “Canceled”

AC3: Practice Operations Contact Queue
Given I am an SFO user within the Corporate Support Apps
When I navigate to Tasks tab
Then I have the ability to view tasks within List View = Practice Operations Contracting Queue
And filtered by:

* Task Record Type = Default
* Filter by Owner = Practice Operations Contracting Queue

And the following columns are visible:

* Subject
* Related To
* Due Date
* Status
* Priority
* Type
* Assigned Alias
* Last Modified Date/Time
* Last Modified By Alias 		29/Oct/25 5:12 PM   2 23/Sep/25 8:04 PM SCP Sprint 11 29/Oct/25 1:41 PM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzzyt 02/Mar/26 8:44 PM As a SFO, when a Practice Operations contract status gets updated to Executed and there is a future executed Practice Operations contract, then I want to be notified, so that I can make the necessary adjustments.

Facility Change Request: Practice Operation Contract - Send notification when future contract exists
