 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3103, PR1050558-3039, PR1050558-3262 Based on Contract Start Date entered in Previous Screen [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1739|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1739|smart-link]

Contract Start Date = user entered date from screen [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1739|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1739|smart-link]

{color:#bf2600}NOTE: As part of this story, the mapping of Radio (Coverage change - Yes or No) of 1739 should be to contract.Shift_Coverage_Change__c (practice operations){color}

# For All Use Case First Step:
## Check if there is forward contract in the System Query: Contract.RecordType = Practice Operations AND Contract.Status in Draft, Submitted, In Progress AND AccountId = Account from where the button was clicked
### Display All the Contract forward Contract using the query output above
### Error Message: There is a draft Practice Operation contract under this service account. The system cannot request a contract change at this time. Complete the pending draft Practice Operation contract or cancel the change to proceed further.
## Check if there is forward contract in the System Query: Contract.RecordType = Practice Operations AND Contract.Status in Executed AND StartDate = Contract Start Date AND AccountId = Account from where the button was clicked
### Display All the Contract forward Contract using the query output above
### Error Message: There is a contract for the Contract Start Date select either a different date for the change or first cancel the existing contract and try again.
## Check if there is contract to clone Query: Contract.RecordType = Practice Operations AND Contract.Status = Executed AND AccountId = Account (from where the button was clicked) Order By Contract.StartDate DESC LIMIT 1
### when not found message “No previous contract -not- found to perform a change to clone from”
# When *Are you requesting only Coverage Change?* = No
## Check if there is forward contract in the System Query: Contract.RecordType = Practice Operations AND StartDate > Contract Start Date AND Shift_Coverage_Change__c = false AND Contract.Status = Executed AND AccountId = Account from where the button was clicked
### if found then display there error message
#### Display All the Contract forward Contract using the query output above
#### Error Message: {color:#ff991f}“There is an executed Practice Operation contract for Rate Change under this service account that lies within the time window. The system cannot request a contract change at this time.“{color}
### When *not* found
#### Display Contract that can be cloned using the Query: Contract.RecordType = Practice Operations AND Contract.Status = Executed AND Contract.StartDate < Contract Start Date AND AccountId = Account (from where the button was clicked) Order By Contract.StartDate DESC LIMIT 1 (Clone the last Contract that executed that is before the requested start date (Contract Start Date) with and navigate to the cloned contract record) (e.g. Contract Start Date = 04/15/2025, C1: 01/01/2025, C2: 04/01/2025, C3: 06/01/2025 then you need to pick C2 to clone)
##### When User Clicks the Create Button
###### when found Clone the entire Contract records including Shift__c, ContractPaymentAgreement, PreventiveCareAgreement and Rate_Pay_Code__c
# When *Are you requesting only Coverage Change?* = Yes
## Check if there is forward contract in the System Query: Contract.RecordType = Practice Operations AND Contract.StartDate > Contract Start Date AND AccountId = Account (from where the button was clicked) AND Status = Executed
### When not found *(Insert new contract in future date)*
#### Display Contract that can be cloned using the Query: Contract.RecordType = Practice Operations AND Contract.Status = Executed AND Contract.StartDate < Contract Start Date AND AccountId = Account (from where the button was clicked) Order By Contract.StartDate DESC LIMIT 1
#### From the Contract selected in 3.a.i.1 check ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = Shift AND ContractPaymentAgreementContractId AND ContractPaymentAgreement.Mixed_Bag_Shift_Rates__c > 1
##### When record found error message {color:#bf2600}“Coverage Change cannot be done for this contract as there are mixed rate for same shift type go back and select no are you requesting coverage change”{color}
#### When User Clicks the Create Button and there is no error condition then clone the entire Contract records including Shift__c, ContractPaymentAgreement, PreventiveCareAgreement and Rate_Pay_Code__c
### When Found *(Insert in between use case)*
#### *Check Future Mixed Mag*
##### Display Contract that can be cloned using the Query: Contract.RecordType = Practice Operations AND Contract.Status = Executed AND Contract.StartDate > Contract Start Date AND AccountId = Account (from where the button was clicked) Order By Contract.StartDate DESC LIMIT 1
##### From the Contract selected in 3.a.i.1 check ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = Shift AND ContractPaymentAgreementContractId AND ContractPaymentAgreement.Mixed_Bag_Shift_Rates__c > 1
###### When record found error message {color:#bf2600}“Coverage Change cannot be done for this contract as there are mixed rate for same shift type go back and select no are you requesting coverage change”{color}
#### *Check current contract is Mixed Mag*
##### Display Contract that can be cloned using the Query: Contract.RecordType = Practice Operations AND Contract.Status = Executed AND Contract.StartDate < Contract Start Date AND AccountId = Account (from where the button was clicked) Order By Contract.StartDate DESC LIMIT 1
##### From the Contract selected in 3.a.i.1 check ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = Shift AND ContractPaymentAgreementContractId AND ContractPaymentAgreement.Mixed_Bag_Shift_Rates__c > 1
###### When record found error message {color:#bf2600}“Coverage Change cannot be done for this contract as there are mixed rate for same shift type go back and select no are you requesting coverage change”{color}
#### When User Clicks the Create Button and there is no error condition then clone the entire Contract records including Shift__c, ContractPaymentAgreement, PreventiveCareAgreement and Rate_Pay_Code__c
##### Contract.RecordType = Practice Operations AND Contract.Status = Executed AND Contract.StartDate < Contract Start Date AND AccountId = Account (from where the button was clicked) Order By Contract.StartDate DESC LIMIT 1 (Clone the last Contract that executed that is before the requested start date (Contract Start Date) with and navigate to the cloned contract record) (e.g. Contract Start Date = 04/15/2025, C1: 01/01/2025, C2: 04/01/2025, C3: 06/01/2025 then you need to pick C2 to clone)

*Either gray out the Create Button or throw error message when Create is clicked



**us below visual a reference only-follow the logic in AC and Solution**

!Use Case_ Request Contract Change - Practice Operations v3.png|width=939,alt="Use Case_ Request Contract Change - Practice Operations v3.png"! 		0 Kristin Koide 13 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project NOTE: guide process starts with story [1739|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1739], next is this rules story, than after this story is [2906|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2906].

AC1: Clone from current active contract - *no* contract with *future start date*
Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Service Account record
And there is ONLY one Executed Practice Operations Contract; NO Executed contracts with a future start date (Executed ‘Contract Start Date’ is greater than requested Contract’s start date)
And I select “Request Contract Change”, input required fields, and click Next
Then the system shall clone the Executed contract and new contract Status is set to “Draft”,

AC2: Clone from current active contract - Allow Draft in between 2 contracts ONLY if *Future contract type is Coverage Change*
Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Service Account record
And there is a Practice Operations contract with future start date and Reason for Change = Shift Coverage Change ONLY
And I select “Request Contract Change”, input required fields, and click Next
Then the system shall clone the current Executed contract (requested contracts ‘Contract Start Date’ is within the executed contract’s start date) and new contract Status is set to “Draft” - clone all fields except EndDate

*NEW* AC2: Clone from current active contract - Allow Draft in between 2 contracts ONLY if *Future contract type is NOT Coverage Change & New change is Coverage Change*
Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Service Account record
And there is a Practice Operations contract with future start date and Reason for Change = Shift Coverage Change ONLY
And I select “Request Contract Change”, input required fields, and click Next
Then the system shall clone the current Executed contract (requested contracts ‘Contract Start Date’ is within the executed contract’s start date) and new contract Status is set to “Draft”

AC3: Don’t clone - Only *one Draft* Contract
Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Service Account record
And there is a Practice Operations contract in Status = Draft, Submitted, In Progress
And I select “Request Contract Change”, input required fields and click Next
Then display error message: There is a draft Practice Operation contract under this service account. The system cannot request a contract change at this time. Complete the pending draft Practice Operation contract or cancel the change to proceed further.

AC4: Check for *different rates within Shift Types* (across facility titles & Shift Type)
Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Service Account record
And I select “Request Contract Change”, and *selected Shift Coverage Change only* and click Next
Then before cloning the system shall check if the current Executed Contract (requested contracts ‘Contract Start Date’ is within the executed contract’s start date) if it has shift types that contains different rates per Facility Title and Shift Type combination

* If there are different rates within a single Shift Type & Facility Title combination, then do NOT allow the user to proceed
** Display error message: Unable to proceed with the selected type of change. Current executed contract contains different rates per Shift Type & Facility Title combination.
* If there are same rates within a single Shift Type & Facility Title combination, then allow user to proceed.

Example of Same Shift Type and Same Facility Title *w/ same rates*

[Facility Title] - [Shift Type] [Iteration] - [Rate]
Ambassador NP/PA - Day 1 - $100
Ambassador NP/PA - Day 2 - $100

EE Physician - Day 1 - $200
EE Physician - Day 2 - $200

Example of Same Shift Type and Same Facility Title *w/ different rates*

[Facility Title] - [Shift Type] [Iteration] - [Rate]
Ambassador NP/PA - Day 1 - $100
Ambassador NP/PA - Day 2 - $110

EE Physician - Day 1 - $200
EE Physician - Day 2 - $210

AC5: Remove “Clone” button from the Practice Operations contract
Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Practice Operations contract
Then the “Clone” button shall be removed.

AC6: No overlapping Contract Start Dates
Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Service Account record
And I select “Request Contract Change”
And the ‘Contract Start Date’ inputted matches the start date of an executed contract
Then the system shall display an error message if the inputted ‘Contract Start Date’ matches the start date of an executed contract (Design: display error on second step)

* Error Message: There is a contract for the same ‘Contract Start Date’, either select a different date for the change or first cancel the existing contract and try again.

{color:#bf2600}NOTE: Solution covers more in depth implementation details not in AC so check the Solution for exact details.{color} 		13/Oct/25 12:32 PM   5 Use Case_ Request Contract Change - Practice Operations v3.png 23/Sep/25 8:02 PM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 11 26/Sep/25 4:52 AM 1|i0e69g:zt 02/Mar/26 8:45 PM As a SFO, I want the system to guide me through the Practice Operations contract change request process, so that a new contract is appropriate cloned from the correct executed contract and additional rules are in place to ensure that the new contract is created correctly. 01/Oct/25

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3043, PR1050558-3107, PR1050558-3291 copied from 2965 - update as needed.
*Shift:*

# When Delete Icon is used in Shift and Shift__c.Cloned_From__c != null then set Is_Deleted__c = true and do not delete the records (show Is Deleted Icon in the Related List Field
## Make Is_Deleted__c = true for the related PreventiveCareAgreement and Rate_Pay_Code__C that is related to the shift that got deleted

*Rate pay Code:*

# When Delete Icon is used in Rate Pay Code and Rate_Pay_Code__c.Cloned_From__c != null then set Is_Deleted__c = true and do not delete the records (show the records as strike through) - *Make Is_Deleted__c editable in layout*
# When Delete Icon is used in Rate Pay Code and Rate_Pay_Code__c.Cloned_From__c == null then Delete the record
# *Re-add:* When the Rate_Pay_Code__c.Cloned_From__c != null then move them to the deleted section and ability to undo (build this similar to how Practice Operation Summary screen)

*PreventiveCareAgreement:*{color:#bf2600} *(Feature is already built validate only)*{color}

# When Delete Icon is used in PreventiveCareAgreement rate entries (irrespective of any types) and PreventiveCareAgreement.Cloned_From__c != null then set Is_Deleted__c = true and do not delete the records (show the records as strike through)
# When Delete Icon is used in PreventiveCareAgreement rate entries (irrespective of any types) rates and PreventiveCareAgreement.Cloned_From__c == null then Delete the record

*Contract:*

# Hide the Delete Icon when Contract.Status != Draft
## Summary tab
### Single Rate
### Type of Rate
## Pay Rate Code



*Preventive Care Agreement:*

# If WHEN PreventiveCareAgreement.Is_Deleted__c is update as False then Update coreponding Shift__c.Is_Deleted__c records as false 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: “Cloned From” *is NOT* populated, *hard delete* records
Given I am system administrator within the Corporate Support apps
When an SFO is working on a *new* contract (RT: *Practice Operations*)/*not cloned*
And contract status = Draft
Then the user shall have the option to select the Delete option on a *Shift* record, if Deleted & “Cloned From” is NOT populated:

* System shall NOT update the “Is Deleted” field
* System shall allow hard deletes
* System shall hide/prevent users from accessing the delete option if the contract status is ≠ Draft
* System shall delete any related Preventive Care Agreement (*PCA*) records & *Rate Pay Code* records

Then the user shall have the option to select the Delete option on a *Rate Pay Code* record, if Deleted & “Cloned From” is NOT populated:

* System shall NOT update the “Is Deleted” field
* System shall allow hard deletes
* System shall hide/prevent users from accessing the delete option if the contract status is ≠ Draft

Then on the Summary tab, the user shall have the option to select the Delete option on a *Rate and Type of Rate* record(s), if Deleted & “Cloned From” is NOT populated:

* System shall NOT update the “Is Deleted” field
* System shall allow hard deletes
* System shall hide/prevent users from accessing the delete option if the contract status is ≠ Draft
* System shall delete any related Preventive Care Agreement (*PCA*), Contract Payment Agreement (*CPA*)record(s), & Rate Pay Code(s).

AC2: “Cloned From” *is* populated, *soft delete* records
Given I am system administrator within the Corporate Support apps
When a SFO is working on a *cloned* contract (RT: *Practice Operations*)
And contract status = Draft
Then the user shall have the option to select the Delete option on a *Shift* record, if Deleted & “Cloned From” is populated:

* System shall update the “Is Deleted” field = True/Checked
* System shall NOT allow hard deletes
* System shall hide/prevent users from accessing the delete option if the contract status is ≠ Draft
* System shall update any related Preventive Care Agreement (*PCA*) records field “Is Deleted” = True/Checked

And if a Shift “Is Deleted” field = True/Checked, the user has the ability to *Re-add*

* -System- User shall update the “Is Deleted” field = False/Unchecked
* System shall update any related Preventive Care Agreement (*PCA*) and Rate Pay Code(RPC) records field via ‘Re-add’ on Summary tab (then system will update “Is Deleted” = False/Unchecked)

Then the user shall have the option to select the Delete option on a *Rate Pay Code* record, if Deleted & “Cloned From” is populated:

* System shall update the “Is Deleted” field = True/Checked
* System shall NOT allow hard deletes
* System shall hide/prevent users from accessing the delete option if the contract status is ≠ Draft

And if a Rate Pay Code (*RPC*) “Is Deleted” field = True/Checked, the user has the ability to *“Re-add”,* if Re-added:

* System shall update the “Is Deleted” field = False/Unchecked

Then on the Summary tab, the user shall have the option to select the Delete option on a *Rate and Type of Rate* record(s), if Deleted & “Cloned From” is populated:

* System shall NOT allow hard deletes
* System shall hide/prevent users from accessing the delete option if the contract status is ≠ Draft
* If the user deletes a *Rate*, then System shall update the related Preventive Care Agreement (*PCA*) record field “Is Deleted” = True/Checked [Existing functionality - to delete and “Re-add”]
** And displays record under “Removed”
* {color:#0747a6}-If the user deletes a- {color}{color:#0747a6}*-Type of Rate-*{color}{color:#0747a6}-, then the system shall update all the related Preventive Care Agreement (-{color}{color:#0747a6}*-PCA-*{color}{color:#0747a6}-) record(s) field “Is Deleted” = True/Checked, within the selected Contract Payment Agreement (-{color}{color:#0747a6}*-CPA-*{color}{color:#0747a6}-) record-{color}{color:#0747a6} [Split to story {color}[+PR1050558-3777+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3777]{color:#0747a6}]{color}
** {color:#0747a6}-And displays record(s) under “Removed”- {color}

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3048, PR1050558-3112, PR1050558-3245 [^Clinician-LDD-Integration - Contract Date and Status Update.pdf]

(CompanySignedDate < StartDate)

Scheduled Flow on Clinician Contract, where Executed and StartDate = TODAY, (new contract)
and If there is an existing contract (Old contract) of the same employment Type and Status = executed, EndDate is > TODAY or null and startdate < = today,
Then make the following update on existing executed contract
OldContract.EndDate = NewContract.StartDate - 1,
OldContract.Status - Cancelled
OldContract.CancellationReason = Superseded.
 0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When a clinician has a Clinician Contract that is *active*:

* ‘Start Date' less than or equal to today’s date
* ‘Status’ equals “Executed”
* ‘End Date’ is blank/No End Date OR End Date is greater (future) or equal to today’s date

And Clinician has a *new* Executed Contract:

* ‘Status’ equals “Executed”
* ‘Employment Type’ is the same other both active/old contract and new executed contract

Then on ‘Start Date’ of the Newly Executed Contract, the system will automatically update the active/old contract’s:

* ‘End Date’ = [New Executed Contract’s Start Date minus 1 day]
* ‘Status’ equals “Cancelled”
* ‘Cancelled Reason’ equals “Superseded”

And if the Newly Executed contract’s ‘Start Date’ is today or in the past, then the system shall *immediately* update the active/old contract:

* ‘End Date’ = [New Executed Contract’s Start Date minus 1 day]
* ‘Status’ equals “Cancelled”
* ‘Cancelled Reason’ equals “Superseded”



NOTE: ‘End Date’ will not get updated to if the End Date is before the start date, End Date must be AFTER the Start date.

|*Old Contract Employment_Type__c*|*New Contract Employment_Type__c*|*Contract.End Date*|*Contract.Status Previous Contract (Use PreviousContractId when available)*|
|Employee|Employee|*Start Date of the New Contract - 1*|*On the Start Date of the New Contract - 1 , then update previous Contract*
Status = Cancelled, Cancelled Reason = Superseded|
|IC|IC|*Start Date of the New Contract - 1*|*On the Start Date of the New Contract - 1 , then update previous Contract*
Status = Cancelled, Cancelled Reason = Superseded|
|Locum|Locum|*Start Date of the New Contract - 1*|*On the Start Date of the New Contract - 1 , then update previous Contract*
Status = Cancelled, Cancelled Reason = Superseded|
|Leased|Leased|*Start Date of the New Contract - 1*|*On the Start Date of the New Contract - 1 , then update previous Contract*
Status = Cancelled, Cancelled Reason = Superseded|
|Partner|Partner|*Start Date of the New Contract - 1*|*On the Start Date of the New Contract - 1 , then update previous Contract*
Status = Cancelled, Cancelled Reason = Superseded|
|Managed|Managed|*Start Date of the New Contract - 1*|*On the Start Date of the New Contract - 1 , then update previous Contract*
Status = Cancelled, Cancelled Reason = Superseded| 		15/Oct/25 5:43 PM   3 17/Sep/25 6:23 PM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 11 24/Sep/25 8:31 AM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzx8y 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM As a Recruiter, I need contract dates to be updated automatically, so dates follow specified business rules 24/Sep/25

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3050, PR1050558-3114, PR1050558-3264 Create a batch job that is Scheduled to run daily
on CPA of (Practice Operations Contract ) where StartDate = Today & Status = Executed , Contract.RecordType = Client, and Type= ShiftType and
Existing_Shift_Type_Added__c = true and Is_Newly_Added__c = true and rateIncreased = false and rateDecreased = false ( to get the newly added shift of same type and no rate change)
OR Rate_Pay_Code_Added__c!= null or Rate_Pay_Code_Removed__c != null ( to get only if rate pay codes are added or removed - part of story 3187)

Get the Client PCAs of this CPA (as the rates from this should be added to the clinician contract)

*Get Clinician Contracts*
Query for CPAs where Contract.RecordType = Clinician and Clinician Contract with Status != Cancelled, (as we are applying changes from PO contract to all contracts) and PNC>HPF>Account = POContract > ServiceAccount

Copy rates for Same shift type
For each of the clinician CPA, get the PCAs and check if they match with the PO.PCA’s ShiftType (PCA > Shift > Shift_Full_Name__c) (eg., Day, Night) and check if the facilityTitle matches between Clinician PCA and PO PCA
Check if the PO.PCA.Rate > Clinician PCA.Rate, if so update the rate.
For the matched Clinician pCA, update the FacilityRate lookup to the new Po Contract.
Insert the PCAs

 0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Coverage Change - new shift with same shift type and same rate
Given I am an SFO within the Corporate Support Apps
When I clone a *Practice Operations contract* in Status = Executed
And I add a new shift with the *same Shift Type*{color:#403294}***{color} with the *same Rate*
And user can only select from *existing rates for that Shift Type*.
And I add a *Rate Pay Code* for that new shift
Then the cloned Practice Operations contract Status gets updated to Status = “Executed” & Start Date equals current date, the system shall automatically Add the Shift & Rate Pay Code to all related *Clinician* contracts meeting the following criteria:

* Clinician Contract Status ≠ Canceled
* HPF Service Account matches Practice Operations Contract’s Service Account

And if the Clinician rate (same Shift Type - Code Set is higher (overrate), then update the rate to match the Clinician’s rate

(example of adding Same Shift Type & Rate:

I have *Existing*: Shift Type = Day, Iteration = 1, Unit of Measure = per hour, Rate = $100
I *Add*: Shift Type = Day, Iteration = *2*, Unit of Measure = per hour, Rate = $100)

(example of Different Rates for same shift type, user to select based on current rate values)
Day 1 = 100
Day 2 = 110

Day 3 = User to select from: ‘100’ or ‘110’



{color:#403294}*Shift Type = Shift’s “Shift Name” (Shift Name is the Code Set record where Code Set Type = Shift){color}





AC2: Rate Pay Code Change - New pay code added to Shift (no Rate Changes) [See story [+PR1050558-3187+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3187]+]+

AC3: Platform event trigger for HPFTrigger (HPFUpdates__e) for Qgenda [See story [+PR1050558-3190+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3190] ]

Only apples for [https://schumachergroup.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/teams/UnifiedPlatform-ReGenesis/_layouts/15/Doc.aspx?sourcedoc=%7B823B3E53-1FF1-4094-B491-CA4D75B11141%7D&file=Account%20Change%20Management.xlsx&nav=MTBfe0Y0OTcyMTI1LTc5RkYtNDgyOC05RUE5LTZGOTlGRjBFMDEyMn1fezAwMDAwMDAwLTAwMDEtMDAwMC0wMDAwLTAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMH0&action=default&mobileredirect=true|https://schumachergroup.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/teams/UnifiedPlatform-ReGenesis/_layouts/15/Doc.aspx?sourcedoc=%7B823B3E53-1FF1-4094-B491-CA4D75B11141%7D&file=Account%20Change%20Management.xlsx&nav=MTBfe0Y0OTcyMTI1LTc5RkYtNDgyOC05RUE5LTZGOTlGRjBFMDEyMn1fezAwMDAwMDAwLTAwMDEtMDAwMC0wMDAwLTAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMH0&action=default&mobileredirect=true|smart-link]

!image-20250926-164923.png|width=939,height=183,alt="image-20250926-164923.png"! 		15/Oct/25 7:16 PM   6 image-20250926-164923.png 17/Sep/25 9:17 AM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 11 24/Sep/25 8:20 AM 1|i0e69g:zzyi 11/Feb/26 1:53 PM As a SFO, I want the system to automatically update all related Clinician executed Contracts based on specific type of updates made to the *Practice Operations* contract record, so that Clinician Contracts stay in sync with the Client contract and contract generation in Qgenda can be appropriately triggered.

* *Coverage Change - Only Shift changes*: no new shift record created. New Shift is add with the same Type and same Rate.
* *-Pay Code Change-*-: Only paycode change, new paycode added to shift (no rate change)- [See story [+PR1050558-3187+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3187]+]+ 		30/Sep/25

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3051, PR1050558-3115, PR1050558-3263 All Changes to Apply to Practice Operation Contract

Create a validation rule in Shift__c to make sure only same shift type can be added when Contract.Shift_Coverage_Change__c = true

* Validation Rule:
** Validation Rule to prevent the user from editing any shift Shift_Name__c when Contract.Shift_Coverage_Change__c = true
** Error Message: “For Coverage Changes Shift Type changes not allowed”

Create a record triggered before save flow that will throw error when a new Shift__c records is created with a Shift Type that is not already available when Contract.Shift_Coverage_Change__c = true and is_cloned = null

* For a new record when Shift_Name__c entered check with Query: Select Shift_Name__c from Shift__c where Shift_Name__c = <Newly entered Shift>
** if the query returns the record then allow save
** if no result is returned error Error Message: “For Coverage Changes new Shift Type changes not allowed”



Preview Updated to UI

When Contract.Shift_Coverage_Change__c = true

Update the Flex Card ContractSpecifyRates

# Type of Rates: Filter and display only Shift
# In the next screen display only the new Shifts that was added previously identified by Shift__c.Cloned_From__c == ““
# When saving the *Preventive Care Agreement* record check if the rate entered matched with already exiting rate for the same shift type and facility title
## Query: Select Max(Rate__c), Min(Rate__c) from *PreventiveCareAgreement* WHERE FacilityTitle__c in (Facility Title Selected) AND Shift__r.Shift_Name__r.Code__c in (shift selected) group by FacilityTitle__c, Shift__r.Shift_Name__r.Code__c
### When Max(Rate__c) != Min(Rate__c) then throw error “The ‘Rate' must match the previous rate entered for the selected Facility Title(s) & Shift Type(s). Select the Facility Title in such a way the rates will match”
### When Max(Rate__c) != newly entered rate in UI throw error “The ‘Rate' must match the previous rate entered for the selected Facility Title(s) & Shift Type(s). Select the Facility Title in such a way the rates will match”
### When Max(Rate__c) = newly entered rate in UI then allow save

!image-20250929-131825.png|width=939,alt="image-20250929-131825.png"!

!image-20250930-130232.png|width=939,alt="image-20250930-130232.png"! 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project – First AC on story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1739|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1739|smart-link] –

-Given I am a SFO-
-When I am on a Service Account record-
-Then I enter the Change Request guided experience-
-Then I must select which changes are applicable:-

* -Shift or Variable Rate Increase-
* -Shift/Variable Rate Reduction or Structure Change-
* -Stipend or Leadership Incentive Rate Change-
* -Coverage Change (note for new user story - if coverage change, create a task for Payroll queue to review before client contract is requested)-
* -Coverage Change with New Shift Type-
* -NP/PA Tier Change-

-And I am able to select one or more changes to proceed with-

-Then I must specify a Start Date (date, required) and Description (text, 1000, required) for these changes-

-Then the system clones the Service Account’s Practice Operations Contract in Status = “Executed” with the newly created contract in Status = Draft-

-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When I select- *-Shift or Variable Rate Increase-*
-Once the Contract has been cloned-
-Then I am only able to edit existing record with a higher number in the rate field or-

-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When I select- *-Shift/Variable Rate Reduction or Structure Change-*
-Once the Contract has been cloned-
-Then I am only able to edit existing Shift rate records or create new Shift rate records-

-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When I select- *-Stipend or Leadership Incentive Rate Change-*
-Once the Contract has been cloned-
-Then I am only able to edit existing Stipend rate or Leadership Incentive rate records or create new Stipend rate or Leadership Incentive rate records-

-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When I select- *-Coverage Change-*
-Once the Contract has been cloned-
-Then I am only able to edit existing Shift records, create new Shift records with the same type, and add rates for newly created shifts that match the same shift type-

-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When I select- *-Coverage Change with New Shift Type-*
-Once the Contract has been cloned-
-Then I am only able to create new shifts where there is not already an existing shift of that type and I can add rates for the newly created shifts (also includes changes in Coverage Change detailed above)-

-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When I select- *-NP/PA Tier Change-*
-Once the Contract has been cloned-
-Then I am only able to edit the NP/PA Tier field-

{color:#403294}REVISED based on Solution/Design{color}

{color:#403294}Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps{color}
{color:#403294}When I select {color}{color:#403294}*Shift Coverage Change ONLY*{color}
{color:#403294}Once the Practice Operations Contract has been cloned{color}
{color:#403294}Then I am only able to create new Shift records with the {color}{color:#403294}*same shift type*{color}{color:#403294}, and {color}{color:#403294}*add rates (no rate changes*{color}{color:#403294}) for newly created shifts that match the same shift type{color}
An{color:#403294}d I am able to add/remove Rate Pay Codes to my newly added Shift records{color}
{color:#403294}And on Summary tab, when I select Specify Rates, then:{color}

* {color:#403294}'{color}{color:#403294}*Type of Rate*{color}{color:#403294}' field I can only select “Shift”{color}
** {color:#403294}I should NOT have the ability to add or edit any other type of rate (Variable, Leadership Incentive, Stipend, Target){color}
* {color:#403294}On Rate Details screen, for ‘{color}{color:#403294}*Type*{color}{color:#403294}' I should ONLY see the Shift Full Name(s) of the newly add Shifts (same Shift Type){color}
* {color:#bf2600}On Rate Details screen, for ‘{color}{color:#bf2600}*Type*{color}{color:#bf2600}' I should ONLY able to add new Shift for existing Facility Title already available with the same Shift Type {color}
* {color:#403294}On Rate Details screen, for ‘{color}{color:#403294}*Rate*{color}{color:#403294}’ the ONLY value that can be inputted is same rate.{color}
** {color:#403294}Error message: The ‘Rate' must match the previous rate entered for the selected Facility Title(s) & Shift Type(s). {color}{color:#6554c0}Select the Facility Title in such a way the rates will match.{color}

{color:#403294}Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps{color}
{color:#403294}When I select {color}{color:#403294}*All Other Types of Changes*{color}
{color:#403294}Once the Practice Operations Contract has been cloned{color}
{color:#403294}Then I am to make edits as needed, no restrictions to current functionality.{color}
{color:#403294}And the system shall track the following updates made. Facility Change Request: Rates & Coverage 2 of 2

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3053, PR1050558-3117, PR1050558-3254 # [See Onboarding Scenarios |https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1-OKSaLgsop5bWkGbMPjIVo2Ru6du-HTr/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=107332607889089087961&rtpof=true&sd=true] The Salesforce team will review and provide an update on status of these items.
## Current Clinician has a FCS (first clinical shift) that has pushed into downstream systems and that date change - Covered under story [+PR1050558-2623+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2623]
## Conversion of clinician from EE to IC - covered under this story [+PR1050558-2815+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2815]
## Conversion of clinician from IC to EE - covered under this story [+PR1050558-2815+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2815]
## Conversion of clinician from EE or IC to a Leased clinician - covered under this story [+PR1050558-2815+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2815]

Flow on contract record, status updated to Executed , Query for existing Clinician Contracts for the same Clinician, where status = Executed, and check if any of the following conditions are true (OR condition)


* Old Clinician Contract Employment Type = *Employee* → New Contract Employment Type = *Independent Contractor*
* Old Clinician Contract Employment Type = *Independent Contractor* → New Contract Employment Type = *Employee*
* Old Clinician Contract Employment Type = *Independent Contractor* or *Employee* → New Contract Employment Type = *Leased*

then, Send email action


* Recipient: [HR@SCPhealth.com|mailto:HR@SCPhealth.com]
* Email Subject: Employment Type Change for <Clinician>
* Email Body:
[Clinician Name] ([Global Provider ID]) is changing Employment Type. Kindly coordinate with the relevant stakeholders and initiate the necessary preparations for processing.
Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Use Clinician.Global_Provider_ID__c



Set Recipient Email Address: Setup -> email alerts -> Send Employment Change Notification -> edit and under *Additional Emails give the HR email or any email that can be used for testing* 		0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a HR team member within the Corporate Support App
When a Clinician already has an executed contract and a *NEW contract gets “Executed”* for the clinician with a different employment type
Then in the following scenarios an email notification will be automatically sent:

* Old Clinician Contract Employment Type = *Employee* → New Contract Employment Type = *Independent Contractor*
* Old Clinician Contract Employment Type = *Independent Contractor* → New Contract Employment Type = *Employee*
* Old Clinician Contract Employment Type = *Independent Contractor* or *Employee* → New Contract Employment Type = *Leased*

And the email shall include:

* Recipient: [HR@SCPhealth.com|mailto:HR@SCPhealth.com]
* Email Subject: Employment Type Change for <Clinician>
* Email Body:
[Clinician Name] ([Global Provider ID]) is changing Employment Type. Kindly coordinate with the relevant stakeholders and initiate the necessary preparations for processing.
Thank you for your attention to this matter.



Example:

Jane Doe (1234567890) is changing Employment Type. Kindly coordinate with the relevant stakeholders and initiate the necessary preparations for processing.

Thank you for your attention to this matter. 		13/Oct/25 11:34 AM   6 11/Sep/25 9:24 PM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 11 15/Sep/25 12:59 PM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzzex 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As a HR team member, I want an email notification to be sent when a Clinician changes Employment Types, so that key teams can manually coordinate downstream updates. 29/Sep/25

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3002, PR1050558-3003 * Link to template [https://docs.google.com/document/d/1gM9YFc0Fu9zy1aaFFZDoWHgCtqD3INIO/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=107332607889089087961&rtpof=true&sd=true|https://docs.google.com/document/d/1gM9YFc0Fu9zy1aaFFZDoWHgCtqD3INIO/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=107332607889089087961&rtpof=true&sd=true|smart-link]
* Field = Term Sheet Executed, creation part of [+PR1050558-1794+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1794]

Doc Gen, Use the sample document provided to generate template.

DR and Transform
From Clinician Contract, extract PNC from which you will get the HPF and ServiceAccounts.
Query the CPA of the Contract and group them by the HPF.
To get the Job details, HPF > Job_Applicant__c > Job > Job Title


|Contract.Employment_Type__c|Contract.Time_Type__C|Shift Type|Compensation| |
|Employee (EE)|Full Time|NP/PA (HPF> FacilityTitle > CodeSetType.)|Contract.EE_NPPA_Full_Time_Monthly_Blended__c| |
|Employee (EE)|Part time|NP/PA (HPF> FacilityTitle > CodeSetType.)|Contract.EE_NPPA_Hourly_Blended__c| |
|All others| |PCA.Shift__r.FullName or PCA.Type__r.Name (whichever is populated)| |, PCA.Rate__c, PCA.UnitofMeasure__c|

NOTE:
SCP mentioned there would be only one HPF in this scenario. However we have to accommodate for multiple HPFs, hence group them per HPF. Use the _OR repeat per HPF format in this document_

 0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter within the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a clinician Contract record
{color:#403294}And the following criteria is met:{color}

* Contract Status = “Approved“
{color:#403294}And {color}
* {color:#403294}[This is a new Contract (Previous Contract field is blank) {color}
{color:#403294}OR {color}
* {color:#403294}Clinician is an Independent Contractor (IC) moving to Employee (EE) employment type]{color}

Then I shall have the ability to click “Generate Term Sheet”, (should NOT be displayed if the criteria above is not met)
Then a document is generated with the following template (attachment = *Conditional Offer Letter (*{color:#403294}*5*{color}*)*),
And the following fields are pulled into the merge fields with the initiating Clinician/Contract details

*Conditional Offer Letter (*{color:#403294}*5*{color}*) -* -delete the following:  “The other terms that govern this agreement can be found at: [*-insert hyperlink*-]” per Greg Bianchi-

* Date = [today’s date]
* Clinician/Clinician Name = Contract.AccountID
* Clinician contact info = [Clinician’s > Mailing Address]
* Insert Title = [ATS Applicant’s > Job > Job Title] (Note: multiple values should NOT be an issue, should only have one job title.)
* Insert Name = [ATS Applicant’s > Hiring Manager’s Name] (Note: multiple values should NOT be an issue.)
* Position = [ATS Applicant’s > Job > Job Title]
* Position Type = Contract.Time_Type__c
* Start Date = Contract.StartDate
* Locations = [Display the contract’s active HPFs *Service Account* name]
* Compensation = [Display the Rates, see below for logic to display]
** If Employment Type = Employee (EE) AND Time Type = Full Time AND Shift Type = NP/PA, then display:
*** Contract’s “EE NP/PA Full Time Monthly Blended”
*** Format = [EE NP/PA Full Time Monthly Blended] per Month
**** Example: $200.00 per Month
** If Employment Type = Employee (EE) AND Time Type = Part Time AND Shift Type = NP/PA, then display:
*** Contract’s “EE NP/PA Hourly Blended”
*** Format = [EE NP/PA Hourly Blended] per Hour
**** Example: $55.00 per Hour
** Else, display
*** Type/Shift Full Name
*** Rate
*** Unit of Measure
*** Format = [Type/Shift Full Name] [Rate] [Unit of Measure]
**** Ex. Day 1 $110 per Hour
* {color:#403294}Anticipated Monthly Clinical Hours {color}= [{color:#403294}Contract{color}> Anticipated Clinical Hours]
* {color:#403294}Special Terms = [Contract > Contract Special Terms]{color}
* -Insert Hyperlink = [NEED HYPERLINK]-
* SCP Employee Name = User.FirstName + User.LastName
* SCP Employee Title = User.Title

And a preview of the generated document is displayed to the initiating user

And Additional actions:

* Cancel
** nothing is generated
** Returned to the Clinician Contact
* Finish (see next AC)

Given I am a Recruiter within the Corporate Support apps

When I am viewing a term sheet document in preview state,
And I click “Finish”,
Then the document is attached to Contract (RT: Clinician) record as a File {color:#403294}(file name = <ClinicianFullName>-<FacilityName(s)>-<DateSent>-Termsheet.pdf) Note to Business: we can follow this format provided, a single contract can have multiple HPFs, so in that scenario we will be listing all. – {color}{color:#403294}*SUGGESTION*{color}{color:#403294}: file name = <ClinicianFullName>-<DateSent>-Termsheet.pdf to avoid a long file name{color}
And user is returned to the Contract record page.

*MOCK*:

!image-20250918-204812.png|width=100%,alt="image-20250918-204812.png"!

--Split to story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2907|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2907|smart-link] –
-Given I am a Recruiter within the Corporate Support apps-
-When I am on Contract record page,-
-And I click “Send Term Sheet for Signature”-
-When No Term Sheet present:-
-Show message to user “Please generate term sheet before sending for signature”.-
-When Term sheet is already generated (based on file attachments)-
-Then the document is sent via DocuSign to the Clinician’s email address on the related Person Account record-

* -Recipient = Clinician’s Email-
* -CC = Recruiter (user’s email)-

-Given I am a Clinician Contracting Specialist within the Corporate Support apps-
-When the document is signed by the Clinician,-
-And the Integration (via DocuSign) has updated the Contract field “Term Sheet Executed” = checked-
-Then from the Contract tab List View = Clinician Term Sheet Executed-

* -Filter = Contract Record Type = Clinician, Term Sheet Executed = Checked-
* -Fields to Display: Contract Number, Account Name, Status, Contract Start Date, Contract End Date, Contract Owner Alias-

-And I navigate to a clinician Contract record with a term sheet-
-And I navigate to Files section (Files Tab on Contract),-
-Then I can view the Signed Term sheet document as file attached there.-

-NOTE: for confirmed during refinement that we want to pull the stars for the term sheet location & compensation (rate + unit of measure)-

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3057, PR1050558-3121, PR1050558-3252 Scheduled Flow Name - PNC Scheduled FLow
-Scheduled Flow or Batch job-
Query for PNC records where Termination Date = TODAY
NOTE: PNC contains HPF (which contains Practitioner/Clinician and Service Account) and Clinician Contract,
Query for PNC where COntract record type is Clinician and HPF.Account = Service Account
From those PNC records,
Create offboarding Case ( RT : Clinician Offboarding)
WhatId = Clinician
Date Termination Received = <PNC’s Termination Date>

Termination Request Date = <PNC’s Termination Date>

Last Day = <PNC’s Termination Date>

Voluntary Termination = True

Reason for Termination = “Hospital Contract Termination”
If employee Type = Employee, Independent Contractor, Partner

Exit Interview Requirement = False/Unchecked

Bonus Repayment = True/Checked

As part of existing logic of 2473, where we update HPF to inactive when all offboarding tasks are completed, check if there are other HPFs for the clinicians that are active. If records are found (active hpfs found) do nothing
if no records found, then update the Contract


Update the Clinician *Clinician’s contract Status = Canceled & Cancel Reason = Terminated* when 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Medical Staff Liaison, Data Quality & Clinician Experience Specialist in the Corporate Support apps
When a Legal team member has completed the “Begin Facility Termination” guided experience
Then if the related Service Account(s) on the Client Contract (RT: Client Contract) has a “Termination Date”, then on the *night of* the “Termination Date” the the following actions shall occur:

* For *each HPF (not in Status = Inactive) related to the terminated Service Account* the system shall automatically create the *Clinician Offboarding Cases* with the following information based on Employment Type: [leverage functionality build in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1727|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1727|smart-link]]
** Employment Type = Employee, Independent Contractor, Partner
*** Date Termination Received = <PNC’s Termination Date>
*** Termination Request Date = <PNC’s Termination Date>
*** Last Day = <PNC’s Termination Date>
**** Help Text: Agreement termination date
*** Voluntary Termination = True/Checked
*** Reason for Termination = “Hospital Contract Termination”
*** Exit Interview Requirement = False/Unchecked
*** Bonus Repayment = True/Checked
** Employment Type = Leased, Locum, Managed
*** Date Termination Received = <PNC’s Termination Date>
*** Termination Request Date = <PNC’s Termination Date>
*** Last Day = <PNC’s Termination Date>
**** Help Text: Agreement termination date
*** Voluntary Termination = True/Checked
*** Reason for Termination = “Hospital Contract Termination”

Then after the current existing Clinician Offboarding automation/functionality will begin for auto Task Creation, Case Closure, Healthcare Practitioner Facility updates (including inactivation on “Effective To” date) [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1728|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1728|smart-link], [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2421|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2421|smart-link], [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2473|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2473|smart-link]

-And the system shall update the- *-Clinician’s Contract Status = Canceled & Cancel Reason = Terminated-* -when: [-*-NEW-*-]-

* -ALL the HPF records related to the- *-Clinician Contract-* -record are in Status = Inactive.- this is updated as part of offboarding automation

Note: Unlike the “Initiate Termination Request” process initiate by the Medical Staff Liaison, Data Quality & Clinician Experience Specialist, the Client Termination can be months out, so it was decided that the creation of Clinician Offboarding cases should Only be triggered on the Date of Client Termination. 		13/Oct/25 11:36 AM   5 09/Sep/25 8:16 PM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 11 25/Sep/25 10:46 AM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzzer 04/Feb/26 11:14 AM As a Medical Staff Liaison, Data Quality & Clinician Experience Specialist, once the legal team has completed the “Begin Facility Termination”, then on the *Client Contract’s Termination Date*, I want the Clinician Facility Offboarding Cases/tasks to be automatically created, so that HPFs can be inactivated and Clinician Contracts can be terminated as needed.

Facility Term: Date of Client Termination Triggers Auto Clinician Offboarding Process

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1862, PR1050558-1918, PR1050558-2858 Object = *Contract*

* NPPA_Tier_Changed__c → Formula

Object = *Shift*

* Existing Shift Type Added?
* New Shift Type Added?
* New Shift Bonus Type Added
* Is Deleted?

Create a Record Triggered Flow for Shift Object Record New or Update Records:

When the Records is Created or Updated

* When the Cloned_From__c Is NULL
** Query for All Shift Records for the Contract where Type__c = CurrentRecord.Type__c AND Shift_Name__c = CurrentRecord.Shift_Name__c AND Cloned_From__c != NULL
*** If Records are returned then Existing_Shift_Type_Added__c = true, New_Shift_Type_Added__c = false
*** Else New_Shift_Type_Added__c = true, Existing_Shift_Type_Added__c = false
* When the Cloned_From__c != NULL && Is_Deleted__c is updated
** Query for All *PreventiveCareAgreement* Records for the Contract where Shift__c = [CurrentRecord.Id|http://CurrentRecord.Id]
*** When Shift__c, CurrentRecord.Is_Deleted__c = true
**** Update all *PreventiveCareAgreement* records returned *PreventiveCareAgreement*.Is_Deleted__c = true
*** When Shift__c, CurrentRecord.Is_Deleted__c = false
**** Update all *PreventiveCareAgreement* records returned *PreventiveCareAgreement*.Is_Deleted__c = false



When I am in Setup on Object = *Rate Pay Code*

Then the following new fields are create (should be visible in Page Layout as Read Only - Check Data Dictionary for Details)

* Is_Newly_Added__c → Formula
* Update the *Subflow Clone All Contract Child Records* flow to include the feature to Clone for *Rate Pay Code*
** Cloned From? Lookup to be populated from where this record is cloned



When I am in Setup on Object = *Preventive Care Agreement*
Then the following new fields are create (should be visible in Page Layout as Read Only - Check Data Dictionary for Details)

* Before Save Flow: Create a new before save flow for object *Preventive Care Agreement* update the field
** Existing Rate Increased? → Formula
** Existing Rate Decreased? → Formula
** Is Newly Added? → Formula
** New Shift Type Added? → Formula
** New Shift Bonus Type Added? → Formula
** Existing Shift Type Added? → Formula
* -Systematically Copied from Previous Contract (not Cloned)?-
** [~accountid:61c036c29ee70a0068954daf] -When is the story- *-Change need to be updated to ALL Forward Client Contract (limiting to only one draft contract there could be only one Forward Contract i.e. Coverage Change)-*
* Is Deleted? (existing field - added here for completeness)
* Over Rate? → Change to Formula to ignore Is_Deleted__c = true



When I am in Setup on Object = *Contract Payment Agreement*
Then the following new fields are create (should be visible in Page Layout as Read Only - Check Data Dictionary for Details)

* Rate Increased? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Existing_Rate_Increase__c" field)
* Rate Decreased? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Existing_Rate_Decreased__c" field)
* Net New Entry Rate? (Display the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Is_Newly_Added__c?" field)
* New Shift Type Added? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "New_Shift_Type_Added__c" field) - Number of new shifts
* Existing Shift Type Added? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Existing_Shift_Type_Added__c" field) - Number of new shifts
* New Shift Bonus? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "New_Shift_Bonus_Type_Added__c" field)
* Is Deleted (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Is_Deleted__c" field)
* Rate Pay Code Added? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Rate_Pay_Code_Added__c" field)
* Rate Pay Code Remove? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Rate_Pay_Code_Remove_c" field)



Flow for updating the Summary:

* When the Contract Status where Record Type = *Clinician* or *Practice Operations* is updated to Status = -Submitted- Executed then a Record Triggered Flow is update below fields
** *Preventive Care Agreement*
For each *Preventive Care Agreement* records select query all related records *Rate Pay Code* records and count the below field and update the count into the corresponding *Preventive Care Agreement* records using Rate_Pay_Code__c.Preventive_Care_Agreement__c
*** Rate_Pay_Code_Remove_c -> (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Is_Deleted__c" field)
*** Rate_Pay_Code_Added__c → (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Is_Newly_Added__c" field)
** *Contract Payment Agreement (*Perform all this in a single Loop of all records *Preventive Care Agreement* records)
*** For each *Contract Payment Agreement* records select query all related records *Preventive Care Agreement* records and count the below field and update the count into the *Contract Payment Agreement* records using PreventiveCareAgreement.ContractPaymentAgreementId
**** Rate Increased? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Existing_Rate_Increase__c" field)
**** Rate Decreased? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Existing_Rate_Decreased__c" field)
**** Net New Entry Rate? (Display the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Is_Newly_Added__c?" field)
**** New Shift Type Added? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "New_Shift_Type_Added__c" field) - Number of new shifts
**** Existing Shift Type Added? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Existing_Shift_Type_Added__c" field) - Number of new shifts
**** New Shift Bonus? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "New_Shift_Bonus_Type_Added__c" field)
**** Is Deleted (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Is_Deleted__c" field)
**** Rate Pay Code Added? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Rate_Pay_Code_Added__c" field)
**** Rate Pay Code Remove? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Rate_Pay_Code_Remove_c" field)
*** -For each- *-Contract Payment Agreement-* -records select query all related Shift__c records- *-Preventive Care Agreement-* -records and count based on logic below and update the count into the- *-Contract Payment Agreement-* -records using PreventiveCareAgreement.ContractPaymentAgreementId-
**** -Mixed Bag Shift Rates-
***** -For one of the FacilityTitle__c if SUM(Rate__c)/ COUNT(Id) != MIN(Rate__c) then Set the Mixed Bag Shift Rates = 1-
****** -Query:SELECT FacilityTitle__c, Shift__r.Shift_Name__c, COUNT(Id), SUM(Rate__c), MIN(Rate__c) FROM ContractPaymentAgreement-
-GROUP BY FacilityTitle__c, Shift__r.Shift_Name__c- 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a system administrator within the Corporate Support apps

When I am in Setup on Object = *Contract (RT Practice Operation)*

Then the following new fields are create (should be visible in Page Layout as Read Only - Check Data Dictionary for Details)

* Previous Contract

* NPPA Tier Changed

When I am in Setup on Object = *Shift*

Then the following new fields are create (should be visible in Page Layout as Read Only - Check Data Dictionary for Details)

* Existing Shift Type Added?
* New Shift Type Added?
* New Shift Bonus Type Added?
* Is Deleted?

When I am in Setup on Object = *Rate Pay Code*

Then the following new fields are create (should be visible in Page Layout as Read Only - Check Data Dictionary for Details)

* Is Newly Added?
* Is Deleted?
* Cloned From?

When I am in Setup on Object = *Preventive Care Agreement*
Then the following new fields are create (should be visible in Page Layout as Read Only - Check Data Dictionary for Details)

* Existing Rate Increased?
* Existing Rate Decreased?
* Is Newly Added?
* New Shift Type Added?
* New Shift Bonus Type Added?
* Existing Shift Type Added?
* Systematically Copied from Previous Contract (not Cloned)?
* Is Deleted? (existing field - added here for completeness)
* Rate Pay Code Added?
* Rate Pay Code Remove?
* Shift__c (existing field change)
** Change *What to do if the lookup record is deleted?* to *Don't allow deletion of the lookup record that's part of a lookup relationship.*
* Over Rate? → Change to Formula to ignore Is_Deleted__c = true

When I am in Setup on Object = *Contract Payment Agreement*
Then the following new fields are create (should be visible in Page Layout as Read Only - Check Data Dictionary for Details)

* Rate Increased? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Existing_Rate_Increase__c" field)
* Rate Decreased? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Existing_Rate_Decreased__c" field)
* Net New Entry Rate? (Display the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Is_Newly_Added__c?" field)
* New Shift Type Added? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "New_Shift_Type_Added__c" field) - Number of new shifts
* Existing Shift Type Added? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Existing_Shift_Type_Added__c" field) - Number of new shifts
* New Shift Bonus? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "New_Shift_Bonus_Type_Added__c" field)
* Is Deleted (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Is_Deleted__c" field)
* Rate Pay Code Added? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Rate_Pay_Code_Added__c" field)
* Rate Pay Code Remove? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Rate_Pay_Code_Remove_c" field)
* -Mixed Bag Shift Rates? (Logic provided in solution)- *moved to* [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3444|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3444|smart-link]

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3058, PR1050558-3122, PR1050558-3276 * New field creation:
** Object = Provider Network Contract
*** ‘Services Sold’ (multi-select) [~accountid:61f8618e8d9e3c00688e380b] can we make this a global picklist, I need it for Letter of Intent and maybe PMT Phase
*** “Client Termination Date” (date)
*** “Client Termination Time” (time)
*** “Client Termination Time Zone”
*** “Terminated By” (picklist)
** Update FLS on the following permission sets:
*** *Manage Client Onboarding*
*** *View Client Onboarding*


Use a Screen Flow:

* Account / Hospital Name : ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.Account.Name
* Service Line: ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.Account.Service_Line__r.Name
* Services Sold: ProviderNetworkContract.Contract.Services Sold
* Physical Address: ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.Account.Parent.BillingAddress
* City: ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.Account.Parent.BillingCity
* State: ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.Account.Parent.BillingStateCode
* Zip: ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.Account.Parent.Zip
* Facility Short Name: ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.Account.Parent.Facility_Short_Name__c
* Staffing Team: ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.Account.Staffing_Team__c
* Client Division: ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.Account.Client_Division__c
* Client Region: ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.Account.Client_Region__c
* Client Termination Date: ProviderNetworkContract.Contract_Termination__c
* Client Termination Time: ProviderNetworkContract.Facility_Termination_Time__c
* Client Termination Time Zone: ProviderNetworkContract.Client_Termination_Time_Zone__c
* Terminated By: ProviderNetworkContract.Terminated_By__c
* Billing Company: ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.Account.Billing_Company__c
* Corporate Entity: Query SELECT RelatedAccount.Name FROM AccountAccountRelation WHERE AccountAccountRelation.AccountId = ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProviderId.AccountId AND PartyRoleRelationId = (SELECT Id FROM PartyRoleRelation WHERE RoleName = 'Services Contracting Entity') AND StartDate =< Today() and (EndDate >= Today() OR EndDate is NULL) Order BY AccountAccountRelation.StartDate ASEC LIMIT 1
* Scribe Hours per Day: Select Scribe_Hours_per_Day__c from Contract where RecordType = Practice Operation and Status = “Executed” and StartDate < Today() and AccountId = ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.AccountId Order by Start Date DESC LIMIT 1 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1:
Given I am a Legal Team Member within the Corporate Support apps
When I completed the “Begin Facility Termination” guided experience [Story [+PR1050558-317+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-317]] from an executed Contract (RT: Client Contract) record
Then from the Contract (RT: Client Contract), I am able to navigate to the Related Service Account records via *Provider Network Contract*
And I select a specific *Provider Network Contract* for the Service Account
And I am able to “Send Offboarding Email” (design is “Send Offboarding Email” is a button)
And in the “Send Offboarding Email” guided experience the user shall have the option to indicate:

* “Revision” (checkbox, unchecked by default)
* If “Revision”is checked, then allow the user to capture Revision Number (-2, 0,- required)

And the Email shall contain the following information:

* To = [DL.Notice Of Operations Changes [DL.NoticeOfOperationsChanges@scp-health.com|mailto:DL.NoticeOfOperationsChanges@scp-health.com]] – *PRODUCTION email*
* Email Subject = Client Termination Notice - <Service Account> <Termination Date>
** or if Revision is selected = Client Termination Notice - <Service Account> <Termination Date>*Rev <revision number>*
* Email Body =
Client Termination Notice
<insert the Field Name and Value>

And create a closed email task with

* Task Record Type = Default
* Subject = “Client Termination Notice - <Service Account> <Termination Date>”
* Comments/Description = < email body >
* Type = Email
* Related to <Service Account>

||*Field Name to be displayed in the Email body*||*Example:*||*Value to display:*||
|Account / Hospital Name|Morgan Medical Center|Account Name [Name] (service account name)|
|Service Line|EM|Service Line [Service_Line__c]|
|Global Facility ID|1453|Global Facility ID [Global_Facility_ID__c]|
|Services Sold|Recruiting;Candidate Pre-Screen (Facility Cred);Scheduling;Provider Enrollment;Coding;Billing|*NEW Field on PNC* - ‘Services Sold’: (multi-select)

Candidate Pre-Screen (Facility Cred)
Scheduling
Provider Enrollment
Coding
Billing
Privileging (CVO)
Leased Providers
Managed Providers
Billing Pro Fee
Coding Pro Fee
Tele-Hybrid
Tele-Triage
Tele-Admitter
Tele-Rounder
Tele-Nocturnist
Tele-Consults|
|Physical Address|1740 Lions Club Rd|Parent Account (Facility/Hospital) > Physical Address [BillingAddress]

|City|Madison|See Physical Address|
|State|GA|See Physical Address|

|Facility Short Name|Morgan MC|Parent Account (Facility/Hospital) > Facility Short Name [Facility_Short_Name__c]|
|Staffing Team|Sierra - Silver|Staffing Team [Staffing_Team__c]|
|Client Division|II|Client Division [Client_Division__c]|
|Client Region|II|Client Region [Client_Region__c]|
|Client Termination Date|10-01-2025|*NEW Field on PNC* - “Client Termination Date”|
|Client Termination Time|0700|*NEW Field on PNC* - “Client Termination Time”|

Given I am a Legal Team member in the Corporate Support apps
*When all of the Task records related to a Client Offboarding Child Case are Closed (Status = Completed or Canceled)*
And the child Case record does not already have Status = Closed
Then the child Case is automatically updated to:

* Status = Closed
* Closed Reason = Complete

-AC2: Auto Close Child Case - Closed /Canceled- [moved to story 1684]
-Given I am a Legal Team member in the Corporate Support apps-
*-When there are NO Task records related to a Client Offboarding Child Case-*
-And the child Case record does not already have Status = Closed-
-Then the child Case is automatically updated to:-

* -Status = Closed-
* -Closed Reason = Canceled-

AC3: Auto Close Parent Case

Given I am a Legal Team member in the Corporate Support apps
*When all of the child Case records related to a Client Offboarding Parent Case are Status = Closed & Closed Reason = Completed or Canceled)*
And the Parent Case record does not already have Status = Closed
Then the Parent Case is automatically updated to:

* Status = Closed
* Closed Reason = Complete

NOTE: added AC2 since we had an open action item on 1684, we are unsure all the which cases to create or not create in story 1683. - If we can align on 1684 (tasks), then we can add an enhancement story to just NOT create the child case based on the service line, rendering AC2 obsolete.

Create a task record as specified in the AC 		0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Auto Task Creation to Create PMT Project
Given I am a Implementation Specialist in the Corporate Support Apps
When the Opportunity (RT: Growth Opportunity) field = “LOI Complete” is checked/true
And “PMT Project” field is not populated
Then the system shall automatically create a *Task* to notify the users assigned to the “Implementation Queue” to create a new PMT Project:

* Record Type = Default
* Subject = Create a PMT Project for <Opportunity Name>
* Assigned To = Implementation Queue
* -Comments = 1. Please create a new PMT Project for the Opportunity 2. “Clone Phases/Tasks” for each Service Account 3. When ready to send out the related tasks, update the PMT Task Status = “In Progress”-
* Comments = 1. Create a new PMT Project for the Opportunity from PMT Template 2. Associate the Opportunity to the PMT Project record 3. “Clone Phases/Tasks” for each Service Account 4. For each PMT Phase associate the Service Account 5. When ready to send out the related tasks, update the PMT Task Status = “In Progress”
* Status = Open (default)
* Due Date =<+5 days from date of creation>
* Type = Client Onboarding
* Priority = Normal (default)
* Related To = <Opportunity (RT: Opportunity Growth)>

NOTE: if the criteria is met we will create a task, user can manually close (canceled) if they have not populated the “PMT Project” and a duplicate task is created. 		03/Nov/25 2:25 PM   5 19/Aug/25 2:18 PM SCP Sprint 11, SCP Sprint 12 09/Oct/25 10:30 AM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzzly 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM As an Implementation Specialist, when the Opportunity (RT: Growth Opportunity) updated to “LOI Executed”, I want a task to be automatically created for our team, so we know to manually create the PMT Project & Clone the Phases/Tasks which will be used to track the onboarding process for each Service Account.

* Priority = Normal (default)
* Related To = <Opportunity (RT: Opportunity Growth)>

Read Only View: Use Flex Card or Edit Block (there is ready only)

Select All HealthcarePractitionerFacility with HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Status__c <> “Inactive” realted to the Service Account (HealthcarePractitionerFacility.AccountId)

# Name → HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Practitioner.Name
# Sign On Bonus → if the query returns any result then check the box for that HPF record
## Query All PreventiveCareAgreement*.*ContractPaymentAgreemen.Type__c = “Bonus” AND PreventiveCareAgreement*.*Type__r.Name = “Sign On Bonus” AND PreventiveCareAgreement.ContractPaymentAgreemen.Contract.StartDate + MonthsADD( Duration_Months__c ) > Case.Termination_Request_Date__c
## No need to check the PNC. Use Contract.AccountId = HPF.PractitionerId and get the PreventiveCareAgreement
# Location (state{color:#bf2600}){color} - Mailing address - State
## HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Practitioner.MailingState
# Business License - State
## Query all records in Billing License for Clinician based on HealthcarePractitionerFacility.PractitionerId and show in comma separated list
# Active in other Facilities (check box) - other active HPFs → if the query returns any result then check the box for that HPF record
## Query HealthcarePractitionerFacility.PractitionerId = HealthcarePractitionerFacility.PractitionerId AND Status__c != “Inactive” AND HealthcarePractitionerFacility.AccountId != (Case.AccountId)

* Business License - State

Given I am a Legal Team member within the Corporate Support apps
When I complete the “Begin Facility Termination” guided experience [Story [+PR1050558-317+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-317]]
And a Parent Facility Offboarding Case has been created per selected Service Account(s) [Story [+PR1050558-1683+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1683]]
And child cases for each Parent Facility Offboarding Case have been created [Story [+PR1050558-1683+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1683]]
Then the system shall *automatically create task(s) related to each Child Case* based on [Document = Client Cases & tasks, tab = Offboarding|https://schumachergroup.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/teams/UnifiedPlatform-ReGenesis/Shared%20Documents/Program%20Documentation/Program%20Execution/Client%20%26%20Clinician%20Experience/Client%20Cases%20%26%20Tasks.xlsx?d=w7f350716ce184e1eb38574b02403912d&csf=1&web=1&e=5LFbsm]:

* Criteria (column G)
** AND
* Service Account’s Service Line “Parent Service Line” (column H)

And Tasks shall be populated with the following information:

* Record Type = Default
* Subject = <column D>
* Related To = <column E>
* Assigned To = <column F>
* Status = Open
* Priority = Normal

And if there are *NO Account Team role member*, then assign to the Child Case Owner, so they can manually reassign the task as needed.

And if there are more than one *Account Team role member*, then assign to the *most recently added* member on the Service Account.

AC2: Auto Close Child Case - Closed /Canceled
Given I am a Legal Team member in the Corporate Support apps
*When there are NO Task records related to a Client Offboarding Child Case*
And the child Case record does not already have Status = Closed
Then the child Case is automatically updated to:

* Status = Closed
* Closed Reason = Canceled

** Marketing Removal
** Notify Telemedicine Vendor
** Communicate Closure to Nursing/Ancillary
** Communicate Program Transition to Onsite Team

** Terminate Hospital Interfaces
** HIT - My SCPCare APP
** Close mySCP Handoff Group
** Remove from mySCP Cares
* Tasks for Child Case Subject: *Equipment Return & Proprietary Materials*
** Hardware Collection
** Shred/Pack Proprietary Material

Child Case Task Creation: Record triggered flow from Child Case 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Parent Facility Offboarding Case(s)
Given I am a Legal team member within the Corporate Support apps
When I complete the “Begin Facility Termination” guided experience [Story [+PR1050558-317+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-317]]
Then for *each* selected *Service Account (PNC),* a Parent Facility Offboarding Case shall be created: (do not create duplicates; update existing open case.)

* Record Type = Client Offboarding
* Status = Not Started
* Priority = Medium
* Origin = Manual
* Type = Facility
* Subject = "Facility Offboarding-<Account Name>"
* Case Owner = Account Team Role: VP Operations
* Account Name = <Service Account>
* Parent Case = BLANK
* Contract = <Contract RT: Client Contract>
* Termination Request Date = <PNC - Client Termination Date>
* Termination Request Time = <PNC - Client Termination Time>
* Provider Network Contract = <PNC>

And if there are *NO Account Team role member*, then assign to *user who initiated* the “Begin Facility Termination” guided experience so they can manually reassign the case as needed.

And if there are more than one *Account Team role member*, then assign to the *most recently added* member.

AC2: Child Facility Offboarding Cases
Given I am a Legal team member within the Corporate Support apps
When I complete the “Begin Facility Termination” guided experience [Story [+PR1050558-317+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-317]]
And for *each* Parent Facility Offboarding Case that is created [AC1]
Then the system shall automatically create the following child cases:

* Child Case Subject: Clinician Review
** Case Owner = Clinician Experience Specialist
* Child Case Subject: Client Systems Access
** Case Owner = Hospitalist Practice Manager
* Child Case Subject: Client Operations Close Out
** Case Owner = VP Operations
* Child Case Subject: Client IT Operations Close Out
** Case Owner = IT Infrastructure Queue (*NEW*)
* Child Case Subject: Equipment Return & Proprietary Materials
** Case Owner = Hospitalist Practice Manager

And child cases are populated with the following:

* Record Type = Client Offboarding
* Status = Not Started
* Priority = Medium
* Origin = Manual
* Type = Facility
* Account Name = <Service Account>
* Parent Case = <Parent Facility Offboarding Case>
* Contract = <Contract RT: Client Contract>

And if there are *NO Account Team role member*, then assign to *user who initiated* the “Begin Facility Termination” guided experience so they can manually reassign the case as needed.

And if there are more than one *Account Team role member*, then assign to the *most recently added* member.

## Related To: *Client Change Management* record 		0 Kristin Koide 2 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project {color:#403294}*Revised AC based on solution and updates to the Account Management Change excel on Type of Changes.*{color}
{color:#403294}(UPDATED AC based on Account Management column C - Type of Change: (Client Change Management - Process Type = Manual - {color}{color:#403294}*records created per story 3388*{color}{color:#403294}){color}

{color:#403294}AC1: Manual Clinician Contract creation is required{color}
{color:#403294}Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps{color}
{color:#403294}When a Client Contract (RT: Practice Operations) Status gets updated to ‘Executed’ {color}

– identifying type of change is covered in story 3388
[{color:#403294}And one of the below type of change(s) has occurred: (Client Change Management records are create as part of {color}[https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3388|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3388|smart-link] )

* {color:#403294}Type of Change: {color}{color:#403294}*Notification - Coverage + Rate Increase*{color}
** {color:#403294}Any new shift for same type added but with higher rate{color}
* {color:#403294}Type of Change: {color}{color:#403294}*Coverage + Mixed Rate Change (multiple rates for same shift type; no new shift type added)*{color}
** {color:#403294}Only shift changes No new shift type record created, no new rate (same rare as an existing rate for that shift type){color}
* {color:#403294}Type of Change: {color}{color:#403294}*Coverage with Signature*{color}
** {color:#403294}Only new Shift Bonus ( handled as part of structure changes){color}
* {color:#403294}Type of Change: {color}{color:#403294}*Rate Change (Stipend and Leadership Incentives)*{color}
** {color:#403294}Addendum B (all changes, increase or decrease){color}
* {color:#403294}Type of Change: {color}{color:#403294}*Rate Change (shift, variable, bonus) - Addendum A with Signature*{color}
** {color:#403294}Rate Change that require signature Variable ( RVU or Encounter plan) have Addendum A (includes rate reductions and structure changes i.e. new shift type){color}
{color:#403294}Addendum A for shift, variable,{color}
{color:#403294}Addendum A2 is for Bonus (only Clinician side){color}
* {color:#403294}Type of Change: {color}{color:#403294}*NPPA Tier Change (Coverage)*{color}
** {color:#403294}change in facility level committed hours 120 to 140 hours ]{color}

--

{color:#403294}Then the system shall generate one task for each of the affected HPFs:{color}

* {color:#403294}Task record type: Default{color}
* {color:#403294}Assigned To: Account Team - Clinician Experience Specialist{color}
* {color:#403294}Subject: Create New Clinician Contract for [Clinician’s Name]{color}
* {color:#403294}Comments: “New Practice Operations Contract Start Date = [Contract Start Date]”{color}
* {color:#403294}Name: [Clinician]{color}
* {color:#403294}Related To: [Client Change Management]{color}

{color:#403294}NOTE: {color}

* {color:#403294}if no Account Team - Clinician Experience Specialist, then set to Contract Owner. {color}
* {color:#403294}In a normal setup, there should only be one CET team member{color}
* {color:#403294}If there is MORE than one Account Team - Clinician Experience Specialist, then select the most recently added. {color}

----

Original AC

--AC1: Rate Change - Signature Required--
-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When a Client Contract (RT: Practice Operations) Status gets updated to ‘Executed’-
-And there was a change to Rates:-

*-Shift/Variable Rate Reduction or Structure Change-*

-Then the system shall:-

* --A <task> is created for Account Team - Clinician Experience Specialist--
** -Subject: Create New Clinician Contract-

--AC2: Rate Change - Leadership (Signature Required)--

-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When a Client Contract (RT: Practice Operations) Status gets updated to ‘Executed’-
-And there was a change to Rates:-

*-Stipend or Leadership Incentive Rate Change-*

-Then the system shall:-

* --A <task> is created for Account Team - Clinician Experience Specialist--
** -Subject: Create New Clinician Contract-

--AC3: Coverage Change - NPPA Tier Change (Signature Required)--

-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When a Client Contract (RT: Practice Operations) Status gets updated to ‘Executed’-
--And there was a change to Coverage –- *-NPPA Tier Change-*-:-
-Then the system shall:-

* --A <task> is created for Account Team - Clinician Experience Specialist--
** -Subject: Create New Clinician Contract-

-AC4: Coverage Change with New Shift Bonus Added-
-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When a Client Contract (RT: Practice Operations) Status gets updated to ‘Executed’-
--And there was a change to Coverage –- *-New Shift Bonus Added:-*
-Then the system shall:-

* --A <task> is created for Account Team - Clinician Experience Specialist--
** -Subject: Create New Clinician Contract-

*-And if multiple criteria are met, with the same effective date, only one task is created-*

-NOTE:-

* --if no Account Team - Clinician Experience Specialist, then set to Contract Owner.--
* -In a normal setup, there should only be one CET team member-
* --If there is MORE than one Account Team - Clinician Experience Specialist, then select the most recently added.-- 		31/Oct/25 1:10 PM   7 image-20251024-080331.png 05/Aug/25 7:24 PM SCP Sprint 11, SCP Sprint 12 04/Sep/25 2:59 PM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzzlzzzcrzzx 10/Feb/26 12:30 PM As a SFO, when the Contract (RT: Practice Operations) Status is set to “Executed”, then I want the system to perform automated actions, so that downstream updates/processes can begin. 15/Oct/25
