 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3079, PR1050558-3143, PR1050558-3285 Record Triggered Flow for Update in PMT Task object

# When the Status of inov8__PMT_Task__c.inov8__Status__c = “In Progress”
## Get the PMT Task Name of the inov8__PMT_Task__c.Name and query for matching name in ActionPlanTemplateVersion to find the version Id
### Use SOQL as reference SELECT Id,ActionPlanTemplateId,ActivationDateTime, ActionPlanTemplate.ActionPlanType, ActionPlanTemplate.Name FROM ActionPlanTemplateVersion WHERE ActionPlanTemplate.Name = inov8__PMT_Task__c.Name AND Status = 'Final' Order By ActivationDateTime DESC LIMIT 1
### If no records found then throw error message “Unable to find Published Action Plan Template with the name that matches PMT Task Name. Review Action Plan Template Setup and try again.” and stop the update.
## Create the Action Plan Record with fields below
### ActionPlanTemplateVersionId = ActionPlanTemplateId from ActionPlanTemplateVersion in above query
### ActionPlanType = ActionPlanTemplate.ActionPlanType from ActionPlanTemplateVersion in above query
### Name = ActionPlanTemplate.Name from ActionPlanTemplateVersion in above query
### Start Date = Today
### TargetId = inov8__PMT_Task__c.inov8__Phase__r.Service_Account__c
## Update the inov8__PMT_Task__c with related data
### *Total Tasks* (inov8__PMT_Task__c.Total_Tasks__c) = Select Count(Id) from Task WHERE Id in (
SELECT ItemId FROM ActionPlanItem WHERE ActionPlanId = [from step 1.b] and ItemEntityType = 'Task')
### *# of Completed Tasks* (inov8__PMT_Task__c.No_of_Completed_Tasks__c) = o (hard code)
### *End Date* (inov8__PMT_Task__c.inov8__Due_Date__c) = Select ActivityDate from Task WHERE Id in (
SELECT ItemId FROM ActionPlanItem WHERE ActionPlanId = '07r7x000000GxLtAAK' and ItemEntityType = 'Task') order by ActivityDate DESC LIMIT 1
### Start Date (inov8__PMT_Task__c.inov8__Start_Date__c) = Today
### *Related Action Plan* (inov8__PMT_Task__c.Related_Action_Plan__c) = Get Action Plan Id once the Record is created in step b and store in inov8__PMT_Task__c.Related_Action_Plan__c



User should have access to Action Plan Template can only be able to perform the operation of making the Status = In Progress otherwise need to revisit how the flow is run (System Context) 		0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Auto create tasks
Given I am a Implementation Specialist in the Corporate Support Apps
And I created a PMT Project for the Opportunity (RT: Opportunity Growth)
And I “Clone Phase/Tasks” for each Service Account
When I am on a PMT Task
And I update the “Task Status” = “In Progress”
Then the system shall automatically:

* Link the Action Plan Template with the same name as the “Task Name”
** Populate the NEW read only (Layout) “*Related Action Plan*” lookup field with Action Plan Template
* Trigger the auto creation of the Action Plan task record(s).
* Populate *‘Start Date’* = <Date the PMT Task Status was set to “In Progress”>
* Populate *‘End Date'* = <Due Date of the Last task (find the task with the max/latest Due Date) based on the task created within the Action Plan Template>
* Populate ‘*Total Tasks*’ (NEW, read only, number) = <populate with number of tasks from Action Plan Template>
* Populate ‘*# of Completed Tasks*’ (NEW, read only, number) = <populate as Action Plan template tasks are completed update the number>

Given I am a Implementation Specialist in the Corporate Support Apps
When the Client Contract (RT: Client Contract) Status is updated to “Executed” [NOTE: Legal team is responsible for setting Status = Executed per story [+PR1050558-3351+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3351]]
And “PMT Project” field is not populated
Then the system shall automatically create a *Task* to notify the users assigned to the “Implementation Queue” to create a new PMT Project:

* Record Type = Default
* Subject = Create a PMT Project for <Opportunity Name>
* Assigned To = Implementation Queue
* -Comments = 1. Please create a new PMT Project for the Opportunity 2. “Clone Phases/Tasks” for each Service Account 3. When ready to send out the related tasks, update the PMT Task Status = “In Progress”-
* Comments = 1. Create a new PMT Project for the Opportunity from PMT Template 2. Associate the Opportunity to the PMT Project record 3. “Clone Phases/Tasks” for each Service Account 4. For each PMT Phase associate the Service Account 5. When ready to send out the related tasks, update the PMT Task Status = “In Progress”
* Status = Open (default)
* Due Date =<+5 days from date of creation>
* Type = Client Onboarding
* Priority = Normal (default)
* Related To = <Opportunity (RT: Growth Opportunity )>

Given I am a Implementation Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When a PMT project exists
Then from the *PMT Phase* I have the ability to create a *Case* for: ‘SUN - Preliminary’, ‘SUN - Revision’, or ‘SUN - Final’ (3 actions/buttons)
And system shall check if “Service Account” field is populated on PMT Phase:

* If yes, then proceed
* If no, user can not proceed
** Display error: ‘Service Account’ field must be populated to proceed
** Available navigation actions:
*** Cancel (“X” icon)
**** Guided experience is closed
**** User is returned to the PMT Phase
**** No case or tasks are created

And if Service Account is populated, then the system shall display:

* Message: By clicking Finish the system shall automatically create new tasks & send the <Dynamically populate based on selection: ‘SUN - Preliminary’, ‘SUN - Revision’, or ‘SUN - Final’ > email. If there are any open tasks, they will be automatically closed and new tasks shall be created.

And available navigation options:

* Cancel (“X” icon)
** Guided experience is closed
** User is returned to the PMT Phase
** No case or tasks are created
* Finish
** Guided experience is closed
** User is returned to the PMT Phase

And upon clicking Finish:

* If the *Case* for the selected Type *does Not exist* then:
** New Case is created
*** Case Record Type = ‘Client Onboarding’ (*NEW*)
*** Subject = <Type> for <Account Name (Service Account)>
*** Case Owner = <user who initiated the case>
*** Type = <based on button selected: ‘SUN - Preliminary’, ‘SUN - Revision’, or ‘SUN - Final’ >
*** Status = 'Not Started'
*** Case Origin = ‘Manual’
*** Priority = ‘Medium’
*** PMT Phase = <PMT Phase>
*** Account Name = <'Service Account' from PMT Phase>
** -Tasks are created based on [part of story- [+-PR1050558-886-+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-886]-] – [Split to [+PR1050558-3517+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3517]+]+
* If the *Case* for the selected Type *does exist* then:
** NO new Case is created
** -Existing Tasks in Status = 'Open' are automatically updated to Status = ‘Canceled’- [Split to [+PR1050558-3517+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3517]+]+
** -New Tasks are automatically created based on [part of story- [+-PR1050558-886-+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-886]-]- [Split to [+PR1050558-3517+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3517]+]+
* -And send the SUN Email notification [part of story- [+-PR1050558-887-+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-887]-]- [Split to [+PR1050558-3517+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3517]+]+

-AC2: Auto Update the PMT Case Status- [Split to [+PR1050558-3517+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3517]+]+
-Given I am a Implementation Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps-
-When a- *-PMT Case-* --for: ‘SUN - Preliminary’, ‘SUN - Revision’, or ‘SUN - Final’ has been created for a PMT Phase--
-Then the system shall automatically update the PMT Case Status:-

* -Update ‘Status’ = ‘In Progress’, when there are open related tasks (Status = ‘Open’)-
* -Update ‘Status’ = ‘Closed’, once ALL related tasks are updated to closed (Status = ‘Complete' or ‘Canceled’)-

-AC3: Ability to view Tasks from the PMT Case- [Split to [+PR1050558-3517+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3517]+]+

-When I navigate to a- *-PMT Case-* --for: ‘SUN - Preliminary’, ‘SUN - Revision’, or ‘SUN - Final’--
-Then I have the ability to view the related tasks-

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3089, PR1050558-3153, PR1050558-3271 Create a button Begin Facility Termination that is visible only in Contract (API Name: Client_Contract) and Conract_Type__c = Master

Button launch as Use a Screen Flow

New field Case (RT: Client Offboarding):

* Termination Request Time
* Update FLS for all permission set that access to the object

* Services Selection
** Display a list of Service Account records related to the Client Contract record
*** Display Service Account records using ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.AccountId records related to Contract.Contract_Type__c = Master
* Services Selection
** For *each* selected Service Account update below PNC record with actual fields
*** Client Termination Date
*** Client Termination Time
*** Client Termination Time Zone
*** Terminated By 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a legal team member in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Contract (RT: Client Contract) record
And Contract Status = Executed
Then I am able to select “Begin Facility Termination” from the header
And the following displays: 

* Services Selection
** Display a list of Service Account (via PNC) records related to the Client Contract record
*** Fields to display: Account Name, Service Line (Name), Client Termination Date
*** User must select at least 1 Service Account (PNC) to proceed.
*** User has the option to select all
** Navigation options:
*** Cancel
**** Close the guided experience
**** Returns the user to the Contract (RT: Client Contract) record
**** No case record(s) created
*** Next
**** Display’s the next screen
* Termination Details
** For *each* selected Service Account on the previous screen, the user enters the following to proceed:
*** Account Name
*** Service Line (Name)
*** Termination Date (required, PNC Date field)
*** Termination Time (optional{color:#bf2600}, {color}PNC Time field)
*** Termination Time Zone (required, PNC picklist field)
*** Terminated By (required, PNC picklist: Company, Facility, Facility Closure, Mutual)
** Navigation options:
*** Cancel
**** Close the guided experience
**** Returns the user to the Contract (RT: Client Contract) record
**** No case record(s) created
*** Previous
**** Returns the user to the previous screen with selections retained.
**** User has the ability to update their selections
*** Next
**** Display’s the next screen
* Confirmation (Per design: moving this to the Termination Details step)
** Display the list of selected Service Account records
** Display the following message: “By clicking Save, you will initiate a Facility Term request. Please note that all Facility Terms are subject to review.”
** Cancel
*** Close the guided experience
*** Returns the user to the Contract (RT: Client Contract) record
*** No case record(s) created
** Previous
*** Returns the user to the previous screen with selections/inputs retained.
*** User has the ability to make updates
** Save
*** Close the guided experience
*** Returns the user to the Contract (RT: Client Contract) record
*** Update the selected PNC record fields based on the user’s input:
**** Client Termination Date
**** Client Termination Time
**** Client Termination Time Zone
**** Terminated By
*** Triggers case creation (see story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1683|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1683|smart-link] ) - Reference only no build
*** A day before the “Termination Date” at midnight (12AM) the system shall auto create a task with the following information:
**** Subject: <Service Account Name> Client Contract Terminated
**** Assigned To: Client Contracting Queue
**** Due Date: <Termination Date>
**** Related To: Client Contract

Split to [+PR1050558-3474+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3474]

-When on a Contract (RT: Client Contract) record-
-Then the user has the ability to update the Client Contract Status = “Terminated”- 		03/Nov/25 2:26 PM   6 12/Jun/25 6:47 PM SCP Sprint 11, SCP Sprint 12 09/Sep/25 5:27 PM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzzi2 29/Jan/26 9:10 PM As a Legal, I need to terminate a facility in Salesforce, so that all SCP teams can stop providing services for terminated clients when needed

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3090, PR1050558-3154, PR1050558-3284 *Action Plan Template* for Client Onboarding Tasks



Object For Action Plan Template = Account

Action Plan Type = {{Industries}}

Migration for higher environment [https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=ind.fsc_action_plans_admin_package_templates.htm&language=en_US&type=5|https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=ind.fsc_action_plans_admin_package_templates.htm&language=en_US&type=5|smart-link]

{color:#bf2600}Data Loader is Complex so cannot be used. Manually Create and can be packaged for higher environment.{color}

----

SELECT Id,ActionPlanType,Status,UniqueName,Name FROM ActionPlanTemplate WHERE Id = '0PR7x0000010kjpGAA'

SELECT Id, ActionPlanTemplateId, ActivationDateTime,Name,Status FROM ActionPlanTemplateVersion WHERE ActionPlanTemplateId = '0PR7x0000010kjpGAA'

AC2: Tasks within each Action Plan Template
Given that I am a System Administrator in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to the Action Plan Template object,
And I select an Action Plan Template, then I can see the following tasks are created based on “PMT - Column C (Grouping Labels)” that matches AC1. Attached document {color:#bf2600} {color}[Implementaton - Kickoff - SUN - POST SUN - actions - 8.19.25.xlsx|https://schumachergroup.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/teams/UnifiedPlatform-ReGenesis/Shared%20Documents/Program%20Documentation/Program%20Planning/Discovery%20Deliverables%20%26%20Documentation/Salesforce%20team%20Deliverables/Architecture/Salesforce%20PP%20Design/Implementaton%20-%20Kickoff%20-%20SUN%20-%20POST%20SUN%20-%20actions%20-%208.19.25.xlsx?d=w4158e8c4ea1944afa83ca789e0b61a41&csf=1&web=1&e=2Ozue6], *tab = ProjectSchedule_PR1050558-314*

* Task Record Type = Default
* Subject* = <Column B - Task>
* Priority* = “Normal”
* Days* = <Column F - Timeframe for Task completion (days)>
* Comments = <Column G - Details/Comments>
* Prerequisites (Select the tasks that must finish before this task can start) = <Column G>
* Assigned To = <Column I- Assigned To (Picklist)>
* Related To = <Service Account>
* Category = <Column H - Subsection>
* Applies to Service Line = <Column E - Service Lines> 		03/Nov/25 2:26 PM   5 image-20251009-224831.png 12/Jun/25 6:43 PM SCP Sprint 11, SCP Sprint 12 10/Oct/25 2:37 PM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzzlzzzcri 29/Jan/26 9:10 PM As a system administrator, I need to create and manage pre-defined onboarding task templates, so that I can have a consistent Client onboarding experience. 14/Oct/25

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3091, PR1050558-3155, PR1050558-3286 See DD tabs: (note if we can update the labels then we need to update the DD Field Label to reflect.

* PMT Project
* PMT Phase
* PMT Task 		0 Jasmine Moradi 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: PMT Project Updates
Given I am an Implementation Specialist in the Corporate Support apps
When I am on a PMT Project record
Then the following fields shall be removed the from the layout:

* Project Initiator
* Project Category
* Program
* Problem Statement
* Assumptions
* Business Case
* Goal Statement
* In Scope
* Out of Scope
* Section = Impact Assessment, and below fields within it:
* SOX Impact
* SOX Comment
* System(s) Impacted
* Process(es) Impacted
* Section = Portfolio Management, and below field within it:
* PMO Contract
* Portfolio
* Initial Start Date
* Initial End Date
* Roadmap Status
* Level of Effort - (defaulted to “Medium”)

AC2: PMT Phase Updates
Given I am an Implementation Specialist in the Corporate Support apps
When I am on a PMT Phase record

{color:#0747a6}(Below changes not possible as PMT Managed Package has custom UI component - Sakthi 10/9/25){color}

-Then see if we can update the label references from “PMT Phase” to “Service Account”: [-{color:#0747a6}--TENTATIVE - need to see if possible. When we implement this story we will see if possible and update the AC if not possible--{color}-]-

* -PMT Phase → Service Account-
* -Phase Health → Service Account Health-
* -Phase Name → Service Account Name-
* -Phase Description → Service Account Description-

AC3: PMT Task Updates
Given I am an Implementation Specialist in the Corporate Support apps
When I am on a PMT Task record
Then the following fields shall be removed the from the layout:

* Topic
* Is Milestone?
* Is Recurring?
* Sign-off status

{color:#0747a6}(Below changes not possible as PMT Managed Package has custom UI component - Sakthi 10/9/25){color}

-And see if we can update the label references from “PMT Task” to “Project Milestone”: [-{color:#0747a6}--TENTATIVE - need to see if possible. When we implement this story we will see if possible and update the AC if not possible –-- {color}{color:#0747a6}*-NOT POSSIBLE-*{color}-]-

* -PMT Task → Project Milestone-
* -Task Name → Project Milestone Name-
* -Task Status → Project Milestone Status-
* -Task Completion % → Project Milestone Completion %-
